1Chronicles1:11 Miziraimu nĩwe warĩ ithe wa andũ a Ludimu, na Anamini, na Lehabimu, na Nafituhimu," 
1Chronicles1:12 na Pathirusimu, na Kasuluhimu (nĩwe warĩ kĩhumo kĩa Afilisti), o na Kafitorimu." 
1Chronicles1:13 Kaanani nĩwe warĩ ithe wa 
1Chronicles1:14 Sidoni, mũriũ wake wa irigithathi, na Ahiti, na Ajebusi, na Aamori, na Agirigashi," 
1Chronicles1:15 na Ahivi, na Aariki, na Asini," 
1Chronicles1:16 na Aarivadi, na Azemari, na Ahamathi." 
1Chronicles1:17 Ariũ a Shemu maarĩ: Elamu, na Ashuri, na Arafakasadi, na Ludu, na Aramu. Ariũ a Aramu maarĩ: Uzu, na Hulu, na Getheru, na Mesheki." 
1Chronicles1:18 Arafakasadi nĩwe warĩ ithe wa Shela, nake Shela aarĩ ithe wa Eberi." 
1Chronicles1:19 Eberi aarĩ na ariũ eerĩ: Ũmwe eetagwo Pelegu, tondũ hĩndĩ yake nĩrĩo thĩ yagayũkanirio; na mũrũ wa nyina eetagwo Jokitani." 
1Chronicles1:20 Jokitani nĩwe warĩ ithe wa Alimodadi, na Shelefu, na Hazarimavethu, na Jera," 
1Chronicles1:21 na Hadoramu, na Uzali, na Dikila," 
1Chronicles1:22 na Ebali, na Abimaeli, na Sheba," 
1Chronicles1:23 na Ofiri, na Havila, na Jobabu. Acio othe maarĩ ariũ a Jokitani." 
1Chronicles1:23 na Ofiri, na Havila, na Jobabu. Acio othe maarĩ ariũ a Jokitani." 
1Chronicles1:24 Shemu, na Arafakasadi, na Shela," 
1Chronicles1:25 na Eberi, na Pelegu, na Reu," 
1Chronicles1:26 na Serugu, na Nahoru, na Tera," 
1Chronicles1:27 na Aburamu (na nĩwe Iburahĩmu). 
1Chronicles1:28 Ariũ a Iburahĩmu maarĩ: Isaaka na Ishumaeli. 
1Chronicles1:29 Ici nĩcio njiaro ciao: Nebaiothu nĩwe warĩ irigithathi rĩa Ishumaeli, nao ariũ ake arĩa angĩ maarĩ Kedari, na Adibeeli, na Mibisamu," 
1Chronicles1:30 na Mishima, na Duma, na Masa, na Hadadi, na Tema," 
1Chronicles1:31 na Jeturu, na Nafishu, na Kedema. Acio nĩo maarĩ ariũ a Ishumaeli." 
1Chronicles1:32 Ariũ a Ketura, ũrĩa warĩ thuriya ya Iburahĩmu, maarĩ: Zimirani, na Jokishani, na Medani, na Midiani, na Ishibaku, na Shua. Ariũ a Jokishani maarĩ: Sheba na Dedani." 
1Chronicles1:33 Ariũ a Midiani maarĩ: Efa, na Eferi, na Hanoku, na Abida, na Elidaa. Acio othe maarĩ a rũciaro rwa Ketura." 
1Chronicles1:34 Iburahĩmu nĩwe warĩ ithe wa Isaaka. Ariũ a Isaaka maarĩ: Esaũ na Isiraeli. 
1Chronicles1:35 Ariũ a Esaũ maarĩ: Elifazu, na Reueli, na Jeushu, na Jalamu, na Kora." 
1Chronicles1:36 Ariũ a Elifazu maarĩ: Temani, na Omari, na Zefi, na Gatamu, na Kenazu; na Amaleki, ũrĩa waciarirwo nĩ Timina." 
1Chronicles1:37 Ariũ a Reueli maarĩ: Nahathu, na Zera, na Shama, na Miza." 
1Chronicles1:38 Ariũ a Seiru maarĩ: Lotani, na Shobali, na Zibeoni, na Ana, na Dishoni, na Ezeri, na Dishani." 
1Chronicles1:39 Ariũ a Lotani maarĩ: Hori na Homamu. Nake Timina aarĩ mwarĩ wa nyina na Lotani. 
1Chronicles1:40 Ariũ a Shobali maarĩ: Alivani, na Manahathu, na Ebali, na Shefo, na Onamu. Ariũ a Zibeoni maarĩ: Aia na Ana." 
1Chronicles1:41 Mũriũ wa Ana aarĩ: Dishoni. Ariũ a Dishoni maarĩ: Hemudani, na Eshibani, na Ithirani, na Kerani." 
1Chronicles1:42 Ariũ a Ezeri maarĩ: Bilihani, na Zaavani, na Akani. Ariũ a Dishani maarĩ: Uzu, na Arani." 
1Chronicles1:43 Nao aya nĩo maarĩ athamaki arĩa maathamakaga Edomu mbere ya Isiraeli gũthamakĩrwo nĩ mũthamaki o na ũmwe: Nĩ Bela mũrũ wa Beori, narĩo itũũra rĩake inene rĩetagwo Dinihaba." 
1Chronicles1:44 Rĩrĩa Bela aakuire, Jobabu mũrũ wa Zera wa kuuma Bozira agĩtuĩka mũthamaki ithenya rĩake." 
1Chronicles1:44 Rĩrĩa Bela aakuire, Jobabu mũrũ wa Zera wa kuuma Bozira agĩtuĩka mũthamaki ithenya rĩake." 
1Chronicles1:45 Rĩrĩa Jobabu aakuire, Hushamu wa kuuma bũrũri wa Atemani agĩtuĩka mũthamaki ithenya rĩake." 
1Chronicles1:45 Rĩrĩa Jobabu aakuire, Hushamu wa kuuma bũrũri wa Atemani agĩtuĩka mũthamaki ithenya rĩake." 
1Chronicles1:46 Rĩrĩa Hushamu aakuire, Hadadi mũrũ wa Bedadi ũrĩa wahootire Midiani kũu bũrũri wa Moabi, agĩtuĩka mũthamaki ithenya rĩake. Itũũra rĩake inene rĩetagwo Avithu." 
1Chronicles1:47 Rĩrĩa Hadadi aakuire, Samala wa kuuma Masereka agĩtuĩka mũthamaki ithenya rĩake." 
1Chronicles1:48 Rĩrĩa Samala aakuire, Shauli wa kuuma Rehobothu kũu gũkuhĩ na Rũũĩ rwa Farati, agĩtuĩka mũthamaki ithenya rĩake." 
1Chronicles1:49 Rĩrĩa Shauli aakuire, Baali-Hanani mũrũ wa Akibori agĩtuĩka mũthamaki ithenya rĩake." 
1Chronicles1:50 Rĩrĩa Baali-Hanani aakuire, Hadadi agĩtuĩka mũthamaki ithenya rĩake. Itũũra rĩake inene rĩetagwo Pau, na mũtumia wake eetagwo Mehetabeli mwarĩ wa Matiredi, ũrĩa warĩ mwarĩ wa Me-Zahabu." 
1Chronicles1:51 Hadadi o nake agĩkua. Anene a Edomu maarĩ: 
1Chronicles1:52 Timina, na Aliva, na Jethethu, na Oholibama, na Ela, na Pinoni," 
1Chronicles1:53 na Kenazu, na Temani, na Mibizaru," 
1Chronicles1:54 na Magidieli, na Iramu. Acio nĩo maarĩ anene a Edomu." 
1Chronicles2:1 Aya nĩo maarĩ ariũ a Isiraeli: Rubeni, na Simeoni, na Lawi, na Juda, na Isakaru, na Zebuluni," 
1Chronicles2:2 na Dani, na Jusufu, na Benjamini, na Nafitali, na Gadi, na Asheri." 
1Chronicles2:3 Ariũ a Juda maarĩ: Eri, na Onani, na Shela. Acio atatũ maaciarĩirwo Juda nĩ mũtumia Mũkaanani, mwarĩ wa Shua. Eri, irigithathi rĩa Juda, aarĩ mwaganu maitho-inĩ ma Jehova; nĩ ũndũ ũcio Jehova akĩmũũraga." 
1Chronicles2:4 Tamaru, mũtumia wa mũrũ wa Juda, akĩmũciarĩra Perezu na Zera. Ariũ othe a Juda maarĩ atano." 
1Chronicles2:5 Ariũ a Perezu maarĩ: Hezironi na Hamula. 
1Chronicles2:6 Ariũ a Zera maarĩ: Zimuri, na Ethani, na Hemani, na Kalikoli, na Darida; othe maarĩ atano." 
1Chronicles2:7 Mũriũ wa Karimi aarĩ: Akaru, ũrĩa wareheire Isiraeli thĩĩna nĩ ũndũ wa kuuna watho na kuoya indo iria ciarĩ nyamũre." 
1Chronicles2:8 Mũriũ wa Ethani aarĩ: Azaria. 
1Chronicles2:9 Ariũ arĩa maaciarĩrĩirwo Hezironi maarĩ: Jerameeli, na Ramu, na Kalebu." 
1Chronicles2:10 Ramu nĩwe warĩ ithe wa Aminadabu, nake Aminadabu aarĩ ithe wa Nahashoni, ũrĩa warĩ mũtongoria wa andũ a Juda." 
1Chronicles2:11 Nahashoni nĩwe warĩ ithe wa Salimoni, nake Salimoni aarĩ ithe wa Boazu," 
1Chronicles2:12 nake Boazu nĩwe warĩ ithe wa Obedi, ũria warĩ ithe wa Jesii." 
1Chronicles2:13 Jesii nĩwe warĩ ithe wa Eliabu, irigithathi rĩake; nake Abinadabu aarĩ wa keerĩ, na Shimea wa gatatũ," 
1Chronicles2:14 na Nethaneli wa kana, nake Radai wa gatano," 
1Chronicles2:15 na Ozemu wa gatandatũ, nake Daudi aarĩ wa mũgwanja." 
1Chronicles2:16 Nao aarĩ a nyina maarĩ Zeruia na Abigaili. Ariũ a Zeruia maarĩ atatũ, na nĩo Abishai, na Joabu, na Asaheli." 
1Chronicles2:17 Abigaili nĩwe warĩ nyina wa Amasa, na ithe wa Amasa aarĩ Jetheri ũrĩa Mũishumaeli." 
1Chronicles2:18 Kalebu mũrũ wa Hezironi nĩagĩire ciana na mũtumia wake Azuba (o na ningĩ na Jeriothu). Ariũ a mũtumia ũcio maarĩ: Jesheri, na Shobabu, na Aridoni." 
1Chronicles2:19 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa Azuba aakuire, Kalebu akĩhikia Efiratha, ũrĩa wamũciarĩire Huru." 
1Chronicles2:20 Huru nĩwe warĩ ithe wa Uri, nake Uri nĩwe warĩ ithe wa Bezaleli." 
1Chronicles2:21 Thuutha ũcio, Hezironi agĩkoma na mwarĩ wa Makiru ũrĩa warĩ ithe wa Gileadi (Hezironi aarĩ wa mĩaka mĩrongo ĩtandatũ akĩmũhikia), nake akĩmũciarĩra Segubu." 
1Chronicles2:22 Segubu nĩwe warĩ ithe wa Jairu, ũrĩa warĩ na matũũra mĩrongo ĩĩrĩ na matatũ kũu Gileadi." 
1Chronicles2:23 (No rĩrĩ, Geshuru na Aramu magĩtunyana matũũra ma Havothu-Jairu, o hamwe na Kenathu na ciikaro iria ciarĩthiũrũrũkĩirie, namo maarĩ matũũra mĩrongo ĩtandatũ.) Aya othe nĩo maarĩ njiaro cia Makiru, o we ithe wa Gileadi." 
1Chronicles2:24 Thuutha wa Hezironi gũkua arĩ kũu Kalebu-Efiratha-rĩ, Abija mũtumia wa Hezironi akĩmũciarĩra Ashuru, ithe wa Tekoa." 
1Chronicles2:25 Ariũ a Jerameeli, ũrĩa warĩ irigithathi rĩa Hezironi, maarĩ: Ramu ũrĩa warĩ irigithathi rĩake, na Buna, na Oreni, na Ozemu, na Ahija." 
1Chronicles2:26 Jerameeli aarĩ na mũtumia ũngĩ wetagwo Atara, nake nĩwe warĩ nyina wa Onamu." 
1Chronicles2:27 Ariũ a Ramu, ũrĩa warĩ irigithathi rĩa Jerameeli, maarĩ: Maazu, na Jamini, na Ekeri." 
1Chronicles2:28 Ariũ a Onamu maarĩ: Shamai na Jada. Nao ariũ a Shamai maarĩ: Nadabu na Abishuri. 
1Chronicles2:29 Mũtumia wa Abishuri eetagwo Abihaili, ũrĩa wamũciarĩire Ahabani na Molidi." 
1Chronicles2:30 Ariũ a Nadabu maarĩ: Seledi na Apaimu. No rĩrĩ, Seledi aakuire atarĩ na ciana." 
1Chronicles2:31 Mũrũ wa Apaimu aarĩ: Ishi, ũrĩa warĩ ithe wa Sheshani. Nake Sheshani nĩwe warĩ ithe wa Ahalai." 
1Chronicles2:32 Ariũ a Jada, mũrũ wa nyina na Shamai, maarĩ: Jetheri na Jonathani. Jetheri aakuire atarĩ na ciana." 
1Chronicles2:33 Ariũ a Jonathani maarĩ: Pelethu na Zaza. Acio nĩo maarĩ njiaro cia Jerameeli. 
1Chronicles2:34 Sheshani ndaarĩ na aanake, no airĩtu. Aarĩ na ndungata ya kuuma Misiri yetagwo Jariha." 
1Chronicles2:35 Sheshani akĩhe Jariha ndungata ĩyo yake mwarĩ ĩmũhikie, nake akĩgĩa mwana wetagwo Atai." 
1Chronicles2:36 Atai nĩwe warĩ ithe wa Nathani, nake Nathani nĩwe warĩ ithe wa Zabadi," 
1Chronicles2:37 nake Zabadi nĩwe warĩ ithe wa Efilali, nake Efilali nĩwe warĩ ithe wa Obedi," 
1Chronicles2:38 nake Obedi nĩwe warĩ ithe wa Jehu, nake Jehu nĩwe warĩ ithe wa Azaria," 
1Chronicles2:39 nake Azaria nĩwe warĩ ithe wa Helezu, nake Helezu nĩwe warĩ ithe wa Eleasa," 
1Chronicles2:40 nake Eleasa nĩwe warĩ ithe wa Sisimai, nake Sisimai nĩwe warĩ ithe wa Shalumu," 
1Chronicles2:41 nake Shalumu nĩwe warĩ ithe wa Jekamia, nake Jekamia nĩwe warĩ ithe wa Elishama." 
1Chronicles2:42 Ariũ a Kalebu, ũrĩa warĩ mũrũ wa nyina na Jerameeli, maarĩ: Mesha irigithathi rĩake, na nĩwe warĩ ithe wa Zifu, na mũriũ Maresha ũrĩa warĩ ithe wa Hebironi." 
1Chronicles2:43 Ariũ a Hebironi maarĩ: Kora, na Tapua, na Rekemu, na Shema." 
1Chronicles2:44 Shema nĩwe warĩ ithe wa Rahamu, na Rahamu nĩwe warĩ ithe wa Jorikeamu. Rekemu aarĩ ithe wa Shamai." 
1Chronicles2:45 Mũrũ wa Shamai aarĩ Maoni, nake nĩwe warĩ ithe wa Bethi-Zuru." 
1Chronicles2:46 Nake Efa, thuriya ya Kalebu, nĩwe warĩ nyina wa Harani, na Moza, na Gazezi. Nake Harani nĩwe warĩ ithe wa Gazezi." 
1Chronicles2:47 Ariũ a Jahadai maarĩ: Regemu, na Jothamu, na Geshani, na Peleti, na Efa, na Shaafu." 
1Chronicles2:48 Nake Maaka, thuriya ya Kalebu, nĩwe warĩ nyina wa Sheberi na Tirihana." 
1Chronicles2:49 Ningĩ nowe waciarire Shaafu ũrĩa warĩ ithe wa Madimana, na Sheva ithe wa Makibena na Gibea. Mwarĩ wa Kalebu eetagwo Akisa." 
1Chronicles2:50 Acio nĩo maarĩ njiaro cia Kalebu. Ariũ a Huru, irigithathi rĩa Efiratha, maarĩ: Shobali ithe wa Kiriathu-Jearimu," 
1Chronicles2:51 na Salima ithe wa Bethilehemu, na Harefu ithe wa Bethi-Gaderi." 
1Chronicles2:52 Njiaro cia Shobali, ithe wa Kiriathu-Jearimu, ciarĩ: Haroe, na nuthu ya Amanahathi," 
1Chronicles2:53 na mĩhĩrĩga ya Kiriathu-Jearimu ĩrĩa yatariĩ ta ũũ: Aithiri, na Aputhi, na Ashumathi, na Amishirai. Kuuma kũrĩ acio gũkĩgĩa njiaro cia Azorathi na Aeshitaoli." 
1Chronicles2:54 Njiaro cia Salima ciarĩ: Bethilehemu ũrĩa Mũnetofathi, na Aatirothu-Bethi-Joabu, na nuthu ya Amanahathi, na Azori," 
1Chronicles2:55 na mĩhĩrĩga ya aandĩki-marũa arĩa maatũũraga Jabezu ĩrĩa yatariĩ ta ũũ: Atirathi, na Ashimeathi, na Asukathi. Aya nĩo Akeni arĩa moimĩte harĩ Hamathu, ithe wa nyũmba ya Rekabu." 
1Chronicles3:1 Aya nĩo maarĩ ariũ a Daudi arĩa maaciarĩirwo Hebironi: Irigithathi rĩarĩ Amunoni mũrũ wa Ahinoamu wa kuuma Jezireeli; nake wa keerĩ aarĩ Danieli mũrũ wa Abigaili wa kuuma Karimeli; 
1Chronicles3:1 Aya nĩo maarĩ ariũ a Daudi arĩa maaciarĩirwo Hebironi: Irigithathi rĩarĩ Amunoni mũrũ wa Ahinoamu wa kuuma Jezireeli; nake wa keerĩ aarĩ Danieli mũrũ wa Abigaili wa kuuma Karimeli; 
1Chronicles3:2 nake wa gatatũ aarĩ Abisalomu mũrũ wa Maaka mwarĩ wa Talimai mũthamaki wa Geshuru; nake wa kana aarĩ Adonija mũrũ wa Hagithu; 
1Chronicles3:3 nake wa gatano aarĩ Shefatia mũrũ wa Abitali; nake wa gatandatũ aarĩ Ithireamu ũrĩa aaciarĩirwo nĩ mũtumia wake Egila. 
1Chronicles3:4 Acio atandatũ maaciarĩirwo Daudi kũu Hebironi, kũrĩa aathamakĩire mĩaka mũgwanja na mĩeri ĩtandatũ. Daudi aathamakire arĩ Jerusalemu mĩaka mĩrongo ĩtatũ na ĩtatũ," 
1Chronicles3:5 nacio ici nĩcio ciana ciake iria ciaciarĩirwo kũu: Shimea, na Shobabu, na Nathani, na Solomoni. Acio ana maaciarirwo nĩ Bathisheba mwarĩ wa Amieli." 
1Chronicles3:6 Ningĩ nĩ kwarĩ na Ibiharu, na Elishua, na Elifeleti," 
1Chronicles3:7 na Noga, na Nefegu, na Jafia," 
1Chronicles3:8 na Elishama, na Eliada, na Elifeleti; othe maarĩ kenda." 
1Chronicles3:9 Acio othe maarĩ ariũ a Daudi, ariũ a thuriya ciake matatarĩtwo. Nake Tamaru nĩwe warĩ mwarĩ wa ithe wao." 
1Chronicles3:10 Mũriũ wa Solomoni eetagwo Rehoboamu, nake mũriũ eetagwo Abija, nake Asa aarĩ mũriũ wa Abija, nake Jehoshafatu aarĩ mũriũ wa Asa," 
1Chronicles3:11 nake Jehoramu aarĩ mũriũ wa Jehoshafatu, nake Ahazia aarĩ mũriũ wa Jehoramu, nake Joashu aarĩ mũriũ wa Ahazia," 
1Chronicles3:12 nake Amazia aarĩ mũriũ wa Joashu, nake Azaria aarĩ mũriũ wa Amazia, nake Jothamu aarĩ mũriũ wa Azaria," 
1Chronicles3:13 nake Ahazu aarĩ mũriũ wa Jothamu, nake Hezekia aarĩ mũriũ wa Ahazu, nake Manase aarĩ mũriũ wa Hezekia," 
1Chronicles3:14 nake Amoni aarĩ mũriũ wa Manase, nake Josia aarĩ mũriũ wa Amoni." 
1Chronicles3:15 Ariũ a Josia maarĩ: Johanani irigithathi rĩake, nake wa keerĩ aarĩ Jehoiakimu, nake wa gatatũ aarĩ Zedekia, nake wa kana aarĩ Shalumu." 
1Chronicles3:16 Arĩa maathamakire thuutha wa Jehoiakimu maarĩ: mũriũ Jekonia na Zedekia. 
1Chronicles3:17 Njiaro cia Jekonia, ũrĩa watahĩtwo, ciarĩ: Mũriũ Shealitieli," 
1Chronicles3:18 na Malikiramu, na Pedaia, na Shenazaru, na Jekamia, na Hoshama, na Nedabia." 
1Chronicles3:19 Ariũ a Pedaia maarĩ: Zerubabeli na Shimei. Ariũ a Zerubabeli maarĩ: Meshulamu na Hanania; Shelomithu aarĩ mwarĩ wa nyina wao. 
1Chronicles3:20 Nĩ kwarĩ na ariũ angĩ atano, nao nĩ: Hashuba, na Oheli, na Berekia, na Hasadia, na Jushabu-Hesedi." 
1Chronicles3:21 Njiaro cia Hanania ciarĩ: Pelatia, na Jeshaia, na ningĩ nĩ kwarĩ na ariũ a Rafaia, na a Arinani, na a Obadia, o na a Shekania." 
1Chronicles3:22 Njiaro cia Shekania ciarĩ: Shemaia na ariũ ake: Hatushu, na Igali, na Baria, na Nearia, na Shafati; othe maarĩ atandatũ." 
1Chronicles3:23 Ariũ a Nearia maarĩ: Elioenai, na Hizikia, na Azirikamu; othe maarĩ atatũ." 
1Chronicles3:24 Ariũ a Elioenai maarĩ: Hodavia, na Eliashibu, na Pelaia, na Akubu, na Johanani, na Delaia, na Anani; othe maarĩ mũgwanja." 
1Chronicles4:1 Njiaro cia Juda ciarĩ: Perezu, na Hezironi, na Karimi, na Huru, na Shobali." 
1Chronicles4:2 Reaia mũrũ wa Shobali nĩwe warĩ ithe wa Jahathu, nake Jahathu nĩwe warĩ ithe wa Ahumai na Lahadi. Icio nĩcio ciarĩ mbarĩ cia Azorathi." 
1Chronicles4:3 Ariũ a Etamu maarĩ: Jezireeli, na Ishima, na Idibasha. Mwarĩ wa nyina wao eetagwo Hazeleliponi." 
1Chronicles4:4 Penueli nĩwe warĩ ithe wa Gedori, nake Ezeri nĩwe warĩ ithe wa Husha. Ici nĩcio ciarĩ njiaro cia Huru ũrĩa irigithathi rĩa Efiratha, na ithe wa Bethilehemu." 
1Chronicles4:5 Ashuri ithe wa Tekoa aarĩ na atumia eerĩ, nĩo Hela na Naara." 
1Chronicles4:6 Naara akĩmũciarĩra Ahuzamu, na Heferi, na Temeni, na Haahashatari. Icio nĩcio ciarĩ njiaro cia Naara." 
1Chronicles4:7 Ariũ a Hela maarĩ: Zerethi, na Zoharu, na Ethinani," 
1Chronicles4:8 na Kozu, ũrĩa warĩ ithe wa Anubu, na Hazobeba, na wa mĩhĩrĩga ya Ahariheli mũrũ wa Harumu." 
1Chronicles4:9 Jabezu aarĩ mũtĩĩku mũno gũkĩra ariũ a nyina. Nyina nĩwe wamũtuire Jabezu, tondũ oigire atĩrĩ, “Ndaamũciarire na ruo.”" 
1Chronicles4:10 Nake Jabezu agĩkaĩra Ngai wa Isiraeli, akiuga atĩrĩ, “Naarĩ korwo wandathima na ũnjaramĩrie mĩhaka ya bũrũri wakwa! Reke guoko gwaku gũkorwo hamwe na niĩ, na ũngitĩre harĩ ũũru nĩguo ndikanakorwo na ruo.” Nake Ngai akĩigua ihooya rĩake." 
1Chronicles4:11 Kelubu, mũrũ wa nyina na Shuha, nĩwe warĩ ithe wa Mehiru, ũrĩa warĩ ithe wa Eshitoni." 
1Chronicles4:12 Eshitoni nĩwe warĩ ithe wa Bethi-Rafa, na Pasea, na Tehina ũrĩa warĩ ithe wa Iri-Nahashu. Acio nĩo maarĩ andũ a Reka." 
1Chronicles4:13 Ariũ a Kenazu maarĩ: Othinieli na Seraia. Ariũ a Othinieli maarĩ: Hathathu, na Meonothai." 
1Chronicles4:14 Meonothai nĩwe warĩ ithe wa Ofara. Seraia nĩwe warĩ ithe wa Joabu ũrĩa ithe wa andũ a Ge-Harashimu. Gwetagwo ũguo nĩ ũndũ andũ akuo maarĩ mabundi. 
1Chronicles4:15 Ariũ a Kalebu, mũrũ wa Jefune, maarĩ: Iru, na Ela, na Naamu. Mũriũ wa Ela eetagwo: Kenazu." 
1Chronicles4:16 Ariũ a Jehaleleli maarĩ: Zifu, na Zifa, na Tiria, na Asareli." 
1Chronicles4:17 Ariũ a Ezara maarĩ: Jetheru, na Meredi, na Eferi, na Jaloni. Mũtumia ũmwe wa Meredi nĩwe waciarire Miriamu, na Shamai, na Ishiba ũrĩa warĩ ithe wa Eshitemoa." 
1Chronicles4:18 (Mũtumia wake wa kuuma Judea agĩciara Jeredi ũrĩa ithe wa Gedori, na Heberi ithe wa Soko, na Jekuthieli ithe wa Zanoa.) Acio nĩo maarĩ ciana cia Bithia mwarĩ wa Firaũni ũrĩa wahikĩtio nĩ Meredi." 
1Chronicles4:19 Ariũ a mũtumia wa Hodia (mwarĩ wa nyina na Nahamu) maarĩ: Ithe wa Keila ũrĩa Mũgarimi, na Eshitemoa ũrĩa Mũmaakathi." 
1Chronicles4:20 Ariũ a Shimoni maarĩ: Amunoni, na Rina, na Beni-Hanani, na Tiloni. Njiaro cia Ishi nĩ: Zohethu na Beni-Zohethu." 
1Chronicles4:21 Nao ariũ a Shela mũrũ wa Juda maarĩ: Eri ithe wa Leka, na Laada ithe wa Maresha, na mbarĩ cia arĩa maathondekaga gatani ĩrĩa njega kũu Bethi-Ashibea," 
1Chronicles4:22 na Jokimu, na andũ a Kozeba, na Joashu na Sarafi arĩa maathanaga bũrũri wa Moabi, na Jashubi-Lehemu. (Ũhoro ũyũ ũrutĩtwo maandĩko-inĩ ma tene mũno.)" 
1Chronicles4:23 Acio nĩo moombaga indo cia rĩũmba, nao maatũũraga Netaimu na Gedera; maikaraga kũu, marutagĩre mũthamaki wĩra." 
1Chronicles4:24 Njiaro cia Simeoni nĩ: Nemueli, na Jamini, na Jaribu, na Zera, na Shauli;" 
1Chronicles4:25 Shalumu aarĩ mũriũ wa Shauli, nake Mibisamu aarĩ mũriũ wa Shalumu, nake Mishima aarĩ mũriũ wa Mibisamu." 
1Chronicles4:26 Njiaro cia Mishima ciarĩ: Mũriũ Hamueli, na Zakuri mũriũ wa Hamueli, na Shimei mũriũ wa Zakuri." 
1Chronicles4:27 Shimei aarĩ na ariũ ikũmi na atandatũ na airĩtu atandatũ, no ariũ a nyina matiarĩ na ciana nyingĩ; nĩ ũndũ ũcio mbarĩ yao ndĩongererekire ta ya andũ a Juda." 
1Chronicles4:28 Nao maatũũraga Birishiba, na Molada, na Hazari-Shuali," 
1Chronicles4:29 na Biliha, na Ezemu, na Toladi," 
1Chronicles4:30 na Bethueli, na Horoma, na Zikilagi," 
1Chronicles4:31 na Bethi-Marikabothu, na Hazari-Susimu, na Bethi-Biri, na Shaaraimu. Macio nĩmo maarĩ matũũra mao nginya rĩrĩa Daudi aathamakaga." 
1Chronicles4:32 Matũũra matano marĩa maamarigiicĩirie maarĩ: Etamu, na Aini, na Rimoni, na Tokenina Ashani," 
1Chronicles4:33 na tũtũũra tũnini tũrĩa twarigiicĩirie matũũra macio o nginya Baalathu. Macio nĩmo maarĩ ũtũũro wao. Nao nĩmaigaga maandĩko ma njiarwa. 
1Chronicles4:34 Meshobabu, na Jamuleki, na Josha mũrũ wa Amazia," 
1Chronicles4:35 na Joeli; na Jehu mũrũ wa Joshibia, mũrũ wa Seraia, mũrũ wa Asieli;" 
1Chronicles4:35 na Joeli; na Jehu mũrũ wa Joshibia, mũrũ wa Seraia, mũrũ wa Asieli;" 
1Chronicles4:36 o na Elioenai, na Jaakoba, na Jeshohaia, na Asaia, na Adieli, na Jesimieli, na Benaia;" 
1Chronicles4:37 na Ziza mũrũ wa Shifi, mũrũ wa Aloni, mũrũ wa Jedaia, mũrũ wa Shimuri, mũrũ wa Shemaia." 
1Chronicles4:38 Andũ acio marĩĩtwa mao magwetetwo hau igũrũ nĩo maarĩ atongoria a mbarĩ ciao. Nyũmba ciao nĩciongererekire mũno," 
1Chronicles4:39 nao magĩthiĩ mĩhaka-inĩ ya Gedori mwena wa irathĩro wa gĩtuamba kĩu gũcaria ũrĩithio wa mahiũ mao. 
1Chronicles4:40 Nĩmoonire kũndũ kũnoru kũrĩ ũrĩithio mwega, bũrũri warĩ mwariĩ, ũrĩ na thayũ na ũkahoorera. Na rĩrĩ, andũ a Hamu amwe nĩo maatũũraga kuo mbere." 
1Chronicles4:41 Andũ arĩa marĩĩtwa mao maandĩkĩtwo mookĩte kuo matukũ-inĩ ma Hezekia mũthamaki wa Juda. Nao magĩtharĩkĩra andũ a Hamu ciikaro-inĩ cia andũ acio o na cia Ameunimu arĩa maatũũraga kuo, na makĩmaniina biũ o ta ũrĩa gũtariĩ nginya ũmũthĩ. Nao magĩtũũra ciikaro-inĩ cia andũ acio tondũ kwarĩ na ũrĩithio mwega wa mahiũ mao." 
1Chronicles4:42 Nao andũ magana matano a nyũmba ya Simeoni, matongoretio nĩ Pelatia, na Nearia, na Refaia na Uzieli, ariũ a Ishi, magĩtharĩkĩra bũrũri ũrĩa ũrĩ irĩma wa Seiru." 
1Chronicles4:43 Nao makĩũraga Aamaleki arĩa meetharĩte magatigara, nao matũire kuo nginya ũmũthĩ." 
1Chronicles5:1 Ariũ a Rubeni ũrĩa irigithathi rĩa Isiraeli (nĩwe warĩ irigithathi, no rĩrĩa aathaahirie ũrĩrĩ wa ithe, ũrigithathi wake waheirwo ariũ a Jusufu mũrũ wa Isiraeli; nĩ ũndũ ũcio, ndangĩandĩkirwo maandĩko-inĩ ma njiarwa kũringana na ũrigithathi wake," 
1Chronicles5:2 o na gũtuĩka Juda nĩwe warĩ hinya gũkĩra ariũ a ithe, na mũtongoria oimĩte gwake-rĩ, ũrigithathi watuĩkire wa Jusufu);" 
1Chronicles5:3 ariũ a Rubeni, irigithathi rĩa Isiraeli, maarĩ: Hanoku, na Palu, na Hezironi, na Karimi." 
1Chronicles5:4 Njiaro cia Joeli ciarĩ: Mũriũ Shemaia, na mũriũ Gogu, na mũriũ Shimei," 
1Chronicles5:4 Njiaro cia Joeli ciarĩ: Mũriũ Shemaia, na mũriũ Gogu, na mũriũ Shimei," 
1Chronicles5:5 na mũriũ Mika, na mũriũ Reaia, na mũriũ Baali," 
1Chronicles5:6 na mũriũ Beera, ũrĩa watahirwo agĩthaamio nĩ Tigilathu-Pileseru mũthamaki wa Ashuri. Beera nĩwe warĩ mũtongoria wa andũ a Rubeni." 
1Chronicles5:7 Andũ ao kũringana na mbarĩ ciao, mandĩkĩtwo kũringana na maandĩko ma njiarwa ciao maarĩ aya: Jeieli ũrĩa mũnene, na Zekaria," 
1Chronicles5:8 na Bela mũrũ wa Azazi, mũrũ wa Shema, mũrũ wa Joeli. Maatũũraga rũgongo rũrĩa ruumĩte Aroeri nginya Nebo na Baali-Meoni." 
1Chronicles5:8 na Bela mũrũ wa Azazi, mũrũ wa Shema, mũrũ wa Joeli. Maatũũraga rũgongo rũrĩa ruumĩte Aroeri nginya Nebo na Baali-Meoni." 
1Chronicles5:9 Maikarire bũrũri mwena wa irathĩro nginya rũteere-inĩ rwa werũ ũrĩa ũtambũrũkĩte nginya Rũũĩ rwa Farati, tondũ mahiũ mao nĩmaingĩhire mũno marĩ kũu Gileadi." 
1Chronicles5:10 Hĩndĩ ya wathani wa Saũlũ nĩmarũire na Ahagari, na makĩmahoota; nao makĩĩnyiitĩra ciikaro cia Ahagari acio rũgongo-inĩ ruothe rwa mwena wa irathĩro wa Gileadi." 
1Chronicles5:11 Nao andũ a Gadi maatũũire mariganĩtie na andũ a Rubeni kũu bũrũri wa Bashani, o nginya Saleka:" 
1Chronicles5:12 Joeli nĩwe warĩ mũnene kũu Bashani, mũnini wake aarĩ Shafamu, akarũmĩrĩrwo nĩ Janai, na Shafati." 
1Chronicles5:12 Joeli nĩwe warĩ mũnene kũu Bashani, mũnini wake aarĩ Shafamu, akarũmĩrĩrwo nĩ Janai, na Shafati." 
1Chronicles5:13 Andũ ao kũringana na nyũmba ciao maarĩ: Mikaeli, na Meshulamu, na Sheba, na Jorai, na Jakani, na Zia, na Eberi, othe maarĩ andũ mũgwanja." 
1Chronicles5:14 Acio nĩo maarĩ ariũ a Abihaili mũrũ wa Huru, mũrũ wa Jaroa, mũrũ wa Gileadi, mũrũ wa Mikaeli, mũrũ wa Jeshishai, mũrũ wa Jahido, mũrũ wa Buzi." 
1Chronicles5:15 Ahi mũrũ wa Abidieli, mũrũ wa Guni nĩwe warĩ mũtongoria wa nyũmba yao." 
1Chronicles5:16 Nao andũ a Gadi maatũũraga Gileadi, kũu Bashani na matũũra-inĩ marĩa maakuhĩrĩirie kuo, o na kũrĩa guothe ũrĩithio wa Sharoni wakinyĩte." 
1Chronicles5:17 Ũhoro ũyũ wothe nĩ wandĩkirwo maandĩko-inĩ ma njiarwa ciao hĩndĩ ĩrĩa Jothamu mũthamaki wa Juda na Jeroboamu mũthamaki wa Isiraeli maathamakaga. 
1Chronicles5:18 Andũ a Rubeni, na a Gadi, na nuthu ya mũhĩrĩga wa Manase, maarĩ na andũ 44,760 mehaarĩirie gũthiĩ mbaara-inĩ: andũ marĩ na hinya wa mwĩrĩ, na mangĩahotire kũhũthĩra ngo, na rũhiũ rwa njora, na mooĩ gũikia mĩguĩ na ũta, na maarutĩtwo kũrũa mbaara." 
1Chronicles5:19 Nao makĩhithũkĩra Ahagari, na Ajeturi, na Anafishi, na Anodabu." 
1Chronicles5:20 Nĩmateithirio kũmahũũra, nake Ngai akĩneana Ahagari moko-inĩ mao, marĩ hamwe na arĩa othe maamateithagia, tondũ nĩmamũkaĩire marĩ mbaara-inĩ. Nĩamacookeirie mahooya mao, nĩ ũndũ nĩmamwĩhokete." 
1Chronicles5:21 Magĩtaha mahiũ ma Ahagari acio: ngamĩĩra 50,000, na ngʼondu 250,000, na ndigiri 2,000, ningĩ nĩmatahire andũ 100,000," 
1Chronicles5:22 na angĩ aingĩ makĩũragwo, tondũ Ngai nĩwe wamarũagĩrĩra. Nao magĩikara bũrũri ũcio o nginya hĩndĩ ĩrĩa maatahirwo rĩngĩ." 
1Chronicles5:23 Andũ a nuthu ya mũhĩrĩga wa Manase maarĩ aingĩ mũno; maatũũrire bũrũri ũcio kuuma Bashani nginya Baali-Herimoni, ũguo nĩ kuuga nginya Seniru (nĩkĩo Kĩrĩma kĩa Herimoni)." 
1Chronicles5:24 Aya nĩo maarĩ atongoria a nyũmba ciao: Eferi, na Ishi, na Elieli, na Azirieli, na Jeremia, na Hodavia, na Jahadieli. Maarĩ atongoria a nyũmba ciao, na njamba cia ita, na andũ marĩ igweta." 
1Chronicles5:25 No matiarĩ ehokeku harĩ Ngai wa maithe mao, tondũ nĩmeheanĩte kũrĩ ngai cia andũ a bũrũri ũcio, arĩa Ngai aaniinĩte mehere mbere yao." 
1Chronicles5:26 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Ngai wa Isiraeli akĩarahũra roho wa Puli mũthamaki wa Ashuri (ũguo nĩ kuuga Tigilathu-Pileseru, mũthamaki wa Ashuri), ũrĩa watahire andũ a Rubeni, na andũ a Gadi, na nuthu ya mũhĩrĩga wa Manase, akĩmatwara ithaamĩrio. Akĩmathaamĩria Hala, na Habori, na Hara, na rũũĩ-inĩ rwa Gozani, kũrĩa matũire nginya ũmũthĩ." 
1Chronicles6:1 Ariũ a Lawi maarĩ: Gerishoni, na Kohathu, na Merari." 
1Chronicles6:2 Ariũ a Kohathu maarĩ: Amuramu, na Iziharu, na Hebironi, na Uzieli." 
1Chronicles6:3 Ciana cia Amuramu ciarĩ: Harũni, na Musa, na Miriamu. Ariũ a Harũni maarĩ: Nadabu, na Abihu, na Eleazaru, na Ithamaru." 
1Chronicles6:4 Eleazaru nĩwe warĩ ithe wa Finehasi, na Finehasi nĩwe warĩ ithe wa Abishua," 
1Chronicles6:5 na Abishua nĩwe warĩ ithe wa Buki, na Buki nĩwe warĩ ithe wa Uzi," 
1Chronicles6:6 na Uzi nĩwe warĩ ithe wa Zerahia, na Zerahia nĩwe warĩ ithe wa Meraiothu," 
1Chronicles6:7 na Meraiothu nĩwe warĩ ithe wa Amaria, na Amaria nĩwe warĩ ithe wa Ahitubu," 
1Chronicles6:8 na Ahitubu nĩwe warĩ ithe wa Zadoku, na Zadoku nĩwe warĩ ithe wa Ahimaazu," 
1Chronicles6:9 na Ahimaazu nĩwe warĩ ithe wa Azaria, na Azaria nĩwe warĩ ithe wa Johanani," 
1Chronicles6:10 na Johanani nĩwe warĩ ithe wa Azaria (ũrĩa watungataga arĩ mũthĩnjĩri-Ngai thĩinĩ wa hekarũ ĩrĩa Solomoni aakire kũu Jerusalemu)," 
1Chronicles6:11 na Azaria nĩwe warĩ ithe wa Amaria, na Amaria nĩwe warĩ ithe wa Ahitubu," 
1Chronicles6:12 na Ahitubu nĩwe warĩ ithe wa Zadoku, na Zadoku nĩwe warĩ ithe wa Shalumu," 
1Chronicles6:13 na Shalumu nĩwe warĩ ithe wa Hilikia, na Hilikia nĩwe warĩ ithe wa Azaria," 
1Chronicles6:14 na Azaria nĩwe warĩ ithe wa Seraia, na Seraia nĩwe warĩ ithe wa Jehozadaku." 
1Chronicles6:15 Jehozadaku nĩathaamirio hĩndĩ ĩrĩa Jehova aarekereirie andũ a Juda na a Jerusalemu matahwo nĩ Nebukadinezaru. 
1Chronicles6:16 Ariũ a Lawi maarĩ: Gerishoni, na Kohathu, na Merari." 
1Chronicles6:17 Maya nĩmo marĩĩtwa ma ariũ a Gerishoni: Libini na Shimei. 
1Chronicles6:18 Ariũ a Kohathu maarĩ: Amuramu, na Iziharu, na Hebironi, na Uzieli." 
1Chronicles6:19 Ariũ a Merari maarĩ: Mahili na Mushi. Icio nĩcio mbarĩ cia Alawii ciandĩkĩtwo kũringana na maithe mao: 
1Chronicles6:20 Ariũ a Gerishoni maarĩ: mũriũ Libini, nake Jehathu aarĩ mũriũ wa Libini, nake Zima aarĩ mũriũ wa Jehathu," 
1Chronicles6:21 nake Joa aarĩ mũriũ wa Zima, nake Ido aarĩ mũriũ wa Joa, nake Zera aarĩ mũriũ wa Ido, nake Jeatherai aarĩ mũriũ wa Zera." 
1Chronicles6:22 Njiaro cia Kohathu ciarĩ: mũriũ Aminadabu, nake Kora aarĩ mũriũ wa Aminadabu, nake Asiru aarĩ mũriũ wa Kora," 
1Chronicles6:23 nake Elikana aarĩ mũriũ wa Asiru, nake Ebiasafu aarĩ mũriũ wa Elikana, nake Asiru aarĩ mũriũ wa Ebiasafu," 
1Chronicles6:24 nake Tahathu aarĩ mũriũ wa Asiru, nake Urieli aarĩ mũriũ wa Tahathu, nake Uzia aarĩ mũriũ wa Urieli, nake Shauli aarĩ mũriũ wa Uzia." 
1Chronicles6:25 Njiaro cia Elikana ciarĩ: Amasai na Ahimothu," 
1Chronicles6:26 nake mũriũ aarĩ Elikana, nake Zofai aarĩ mũriũ wa Elikana, nake Nahathu aarĩ mũriũ wa Zofai," 
1Chronicles6:27 nake Eliabu aarĩ mũriũ wa Nahathu, nake Jerohamu aarĩ mũriũ wa Eliabu, nake Elikana aarĩ mũriũ wa Jerohamu, nake Samũeli aarĩ mũriũ wa Elikana." 
1Chronicles6:28 Ariũ a Samũeli maarĩ: Joeli irigithathi, na mũriũ wa keerĩ aarĩ Abija." 
1Chronicles6:28 Ariũ a Samũeli maarĩ: Joeli irigithathi, na mũriũ wa keerĩ aarĩ Abija." 
1Chronicles6:29 Njiaro cia Merari ciarĩ: Mahili, nake mũriũ aarĩ Libini, nake Shimei aarĩ mũriũ wa Libini, nake Uza aarĩ mũriũ wa Shimei," 
1Chronicles6:30 nake Shimea aarĩ mũriũ wa Uza, nake Hagia aarĩ mũriũ wa Shimea, nake Asaia aarĩ mũriũ wa Hagia." 
1Chronicles6:31 Aya nĩo andũ arĩa Daudi aatuire arũgamĩrĩri a ũini nyũmba-inĩ ya Jehova thuutha wa ithandũkũ rĩa kĩrĩkanĩro gũkinya kũu. 
1Chronicles6:32 Maatungataga na ũini Hema-inĩ-ya-Gũtũnganwo o nginya rĩrĩa Solomoni aakire hekarũ ya Jehova kũu Jerusalemu. Nao maarutaga wĩra wao kũringana na mawatho marĩa maatuĩtwo. 
1Chronicles6:33 Aya nĩo andũ arĩa maarutaga wĩra, hamwe na ariũ ao: Kuuma kũrĩ Akohathu maarĩ: Hemani ũrĩa mũini, mũrũ wa Joeli, mũrũ wa Samũeli," 
1Chronicles6:33 Aya nĩo andũ arĩa maarutaga wĩra, hamwe na ariũ ao: Kuuma kũrĩ Akohathu maarĩ: Hemani ũrĩa mũini, mũrũ wa Joeli, mũrũ wa Samũeli," 
1Chronicles6:34 mũrũ wa Elikana, mũrũ wa Jerohamu, mũrũ wa Elieli, mũrũ wa Toa," 
1Chronicles6:35 mũrũ wa Zufu, mũrũ wa Elikana, mũrũ wa Mahathu mũrũ wa Amasai," 
1Chronicles6:36 mũrũ wa Elikana, mũrũ wa Joeli, mũrũ wa Azaria, mũrũ wa Zefania," 
1Chronicles6:36 mũrũ wa Elikana, mũrũ wa Joeli, mũrũ wa Azaria, mũrũ wa Zefania," 
1Chronicles6:37 mũrũ wa Tahathu, mũrũ wa Asiru, mũrũ wa Ebiasafu, mũrũ wa Kora," 
1Chronicles6:38 mũrũ wa Iziharu, mũrũ wa Kohathu, mũrũ wa Lawi, mũrũ wa Isiraeli;" 
1Chronicles6:39 na Asafu, mũthiritũ wa Hemani, ũrĩa watungataga mwena wake wa ũrĩo: Asafu aarĩ mũrũ wa Berekia, mũrũ wa Shimea," 
1Chronicles6:40 mũrũ wa Mikaeli, mũrũ wa Baaseia, mũrũ wa Malikija" 
1Chronicles6:41 mũrũ wa Ethini, mũrũ wa Zera, mũrũ wa Adaia," 
1Chronicles6:42 mũrũ wa Ethani, mũrũ wa Zima, mũrũ wa Shimei," 
1Chronicles6:43 mũrũ wa Jahathu, mũrũ wa Gerishoni, mũrũ wa Lawi;" 
1Chronicles6:44 na kuuma kũrĩ athiritũ ao, Amerari, arĩa maatungataga marĩ mwena wake wa ũmotho, maarĩ: Ethani mũrũ wa Kishi, mũrũ wa Abudi, mũrũ wa Maluku," 
1Chronicles6:45 mũrũ wa Hashabia, mũrũ wa Amazia, mũrũ wa Hilikia," 
1Chronicles6:46 mũrũ wa Amuzi, mũrũ wa Bani, mũrũ wa Shemeri," 
1Chronicles6:47 mũrũ wa Mahali, mũrũ wa Mushi, mũrũ wa Merari, mũrũ wa Lawi." 
1Chronicles6:48 Alawii arĩa maarĩ a thiritũ yao maagaĩirwo mawĩra marĩa mangĩ mothe ma hema ĩrĩa nyamũre, o ĩyo nyũmba ya Ngai." 
1Chronicles6:49 No Harũni na njiaro ciake nĩo maarutaga magongona kĩgongona-inĩ kĩa igongona rĩa njino, na kĩgongona-inĩ gĩa gũcinĩrwo ũbumba, na wĩra wothe warutagwo ũkonainie na Handũ-hau-Hatheru-Mũno, nĩ ũndũ wa kũhoroheria andũ a Isiraeli mehia, kũringana na ũrĩa Musa ndungata ya Ngai yaathanĩte." 
1Chronicles6:50 Ici nĩcio njiaro cia Harũni: Mũriũ aarĩ Eliazaru, nake mũriũ wake aarĩ Finehasi, nake Abishua aarĩ mũriũ wa Finehasi," 
1Chronicles6:51 nake Buki aarĩ mũriũ wa Abishua, nake Uzi aarĩ mũriũ wa Buki, nake Zerahia aarĩ mũriũ wa Uzi," 
1Chronicles6:52 nake Meraiothu aarĩ mũriũ wa Zerahia, nake Amaria aarĩ mũriũ wa Meraiothu, nake Ahitubu aarĩ mũriũ wa Amaria," 
1Chronicles6:53 nake Zadoku aarĩ mũriũ wa Ahitubu, nake Ahimaazu aarĩ mũriũ wa Zadoku." 
1Chronicles6:54 Na rĩrĩ, gũkũ nĩkuo kũndũ kũrĩa maagaĩirwo kũrĩ bũrũri wao (nakuo kwagaĩirwo njiaro cia Harũni iria ciarĩ cia mbarĩ ya Kohathu, tondũ igai rĩa mbere rĩarĩ rĩao):" 
1Chronicles6:55 Maaheirwo Hebironi kũu Juda, o hamwe na ũrĩithio ũrĩa warigiicĩirie." 
1Chronicles6:56 No mĩgũnda na matũũra marĩa maakuhĩrĩirie itũũra inene maaheirwo Kalebu mũrũ wa Jefune. 
1Chronicles6:57 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio njiaro cia Harũni ciaheirwo Hebironi (itũũra inene rĩa kũũrĩra) na Libina, na Jatiri, na Eshitemoa," 
1Chronicles6:58 na Hileni, na Debiri," 
1Chronicles6:59 na Ashani, na Juta, na Bethi-Shemeshu, hamwe na ũrĩithio wamo." 
1Chronicles6:60 Na kuuma mũhĩrĩga wa Benjamini maaheirwo Gibeoni, na Geba, na Alemethu, na Anathothu, hamwe na ũrĩithio wamo. Matũũra marĩa maagaĩirwo mĩhĩrĩga ya Akohathu mothe maarĩ ikũmi na matatũ." 
1Chronicles6:61 Njiaro icio ingĩ cia Kohathu ciaheirwo matũũra ikũmi, kuuma kũrĩ nuthu ya mũhĩrĩga wa Manase." 
1Chronicles6:62 Njiaro cia Gerishoni, mbarĩ o mbarĩ ciagaĩirwo matũũra ikũmi na matatũ kuuma kũrĩ mũhĩrĩga wa Isakaru, na wa Asheri, na wa Nafitali, na kuuma kũrĩ gĩcunjĩ kĩa mũhĩrĩga wa Manase ũrĩa ũrĩ Bashani." 
1Chronicles6:63 Njiaro cia Merari, mbarĩ o mbarĩ, ciagaĩirwo matũũra ikũmi na meerĩ kuuma kũrĩ mũhĩrĩga wa Rubeni, na wa Gadi, na wa Zebuluni." 
1Chronicles6:64 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio andũ a Isiraeli makĩhe Alawii matũũra macio na ũrĩithio wamo. 
1Chronicles6:65 Kuuma mũhĩrĩga wa Juda, na wa Simeoni, na wa Benjamini makĩmahe matũũra macio magwetetwo." 
1Chronicles6:66 Mbarĩ imwe cia Akohathu ciaheirwo matũũra nĩ mũhĩrĩga wa Efiraimu matuĩke bũrũri wao. 
1Chronicles6:67 Kuuma bũrũri ũrĩa ũrĩ irĩma wa Efiraimu maaheirwo Shekemu (itũũra rĩa kũũrĩra), na Gezeri," 
1Chronicles6:68 na Jokimeamu, na Bethi-Horoni," 
1Chronicles6:69 na Aijaloni, na Gathi-Rimoni, hamwe na ũrĩithio wamo." 
1Chronicles6:70 Na kuuma nuthu ya mũhĩrĩga wa Manase-rĩ, andũ a Isiraeli makĩheana matũũra ma Aneri na Bileamu, hamwe na ũrĩithio wamo, kũrĩ mbarĩ iria ingĩ cia Akohathu." 
1Chronicles6:71 Agerishoni maagaĩirwo matũũra maya: Kuuma nuthu ya mũhĩrĩga wa Manase makĩheo Golani kũu Bashani, o na Ashitarothu, hamwe na ũrĩithio wamo;" 
1Chronicles6:72 Kuuma mũhĩrĩga wa Isakaru makĩheo Kadeshi, na Daberathu," 
1Chronicles6:73 na Ramothu, na Anemu, hamwe na ũrĩithio wamo;" 
1Chronicles6:74 Kuuma mũhĩrĩga wa Asheri makĩheo Mashali, na Abidoni," 
1Chronicles6:75 na Hukoku, na Rehobu, hamwe na ũrĩithio wamo;" 
1Chronicles6:76 Na kuuma mũhĩrĩga wa Nafitali makĩheo Kedeshi kũu Galili, na Hamoni, na Kiriathaimu, hamwe na ũrĩithio wamo." 
1Chronicles6:77 Amerari (Alawii arĩa angĩ) maagaĩirwo matũũra maya: Kuuma mũhĩrĩga wa Zebuluni makĩheo Jokineamu, na Karita, na Rimono, na Taboru, hamwe na ũrĩithio wamo;" 
1Chronicles6:78 kuuma mũhĩrĩga wa Rubeni mũrĩmo wa Jorodani mwena wa irathĩro wa Jeriko, makĩheo Bezeri werũ-inĩ, na Jahaza," 
1Chronicles6:79 na Kedemothu, na Mefaathu, hamwe na ũrĩithio wamo;" 
1Chronicles6:80 na kuuma mũhĩrĩga wa Gadi makĩheo Ramothu o kũu Gileadi, na Mahanaimu," 
1Chronicles6:81 na Heshiboni, na Jazeri, hamwe na ũrĩithio wamo." 
1Chronicles7:1 Ariũ a Isakaru maarĩ: Tola, na Pua, na Jashubu, na Shimuroni; othe maarĩ ana." 
1Chronicles7:2 Ariũ a Tola maarĩ: Uzi, na Refaia, na Jerieli, na Jahamai, na Ibisamu, na Shemueli; nao maarĩ atongoria a nyũmba ciao. Hĩndĩ ya wathani wa Daudi, njiaro cia Tola iria ciaandĩkĩtwo maandĩko-inĩ ma njiarwa ciao marĩ andũ a kũrũa mbaara maarĩ 22,600." 
1Chronicles7:3 Mũriũ wa Uzi aarĩ: Izirahia. Ariũ a Izirahia maarĩ: Mikaeli, na Obadia, na Joeli, na Ishia. Othe atano maarĩ anene a andũ ao." 
1Chronicles7:3 Mũriũ wa Uzi aarĩ: Izirahia. Ariũ a Izirahia maarĩ: Mikaeli, na Obadia, na Joeli, na Ishia. Othe atano maarĩ anene a andũ ao." 
1Chronicles7:4 Kũringana na maandĩko ma njiarwa cia nyũmba ciao, maarĩ na arũme mehaarĩirie kũrũa mbaara 36,000, nĩgũkorwo maarĩ na atumia aingĩ na ciana nyingĩ." 
1Chronicles7:5 Andũ ao arĩa maangĩarũire mbaara kuuma mĩhĩrĩga-inĩ yothe ya Isakaru, kũringana na maandĩko ma njiarwa ciao, maarĩ 87,000 marĩ othe." 
1Chronicles7:6 Ariũ atatũ a Benjamini maarĩ: Bela, na Bekeri, na Jediaeli." 
1Chronicles7:7 Ariũ a Bela maarĩ: Eziboni, na Uzi, na Uzieli, na Jerimothu, na Iri; othe maarĩ atano, na maarĩ atongoria a nyũmba ciao. Maandĩko ma njiarwa ciao moonanagia arũme a kũrũa mbaara maarĩ 22,034." 
1Chronicles7:8 Ariũ a Bekeri maarĩ: Zemira, na Joashu, na Eliezeri, na Elioenai, na Omuri, na Jeremothu, na Abija, na Anathothu, na Alemethu. Acio othe maarĩ ariũ a Bekeri." 
1Chronicles7:9 Maandĩko ma njiarwa ciao moonanagia atongoria a nyũmba, na arũme a kũrũa mbaara 20,200." 
1Chronicles7:10 Mũriũ wa Jediaeli aarĩ: Bilihani. Ariũ a Bilihani maarĩ: Jeushu, na Benjamini, na Ehudu, na Kenaana, na Zethani, na Tarishishi, na Ahishaharu." 
1Chronicles7:11 Ariũ acio othe a Jediaeli maarĩ atongoria a nyũmba ciao. Nĩ kwarĩ na arũme 17,200 a kũrũa mehaarĩirie gũthiĩ mbaara-inĩ." 
1Chronicles7:12 Nao andũ a Shupimu na a Hupimu maarĩ a rũciaro rwa Iru, nao Ahushimu maarĩ a rũciaro rwa Aheri." 
1Chronicles7:13 Ariũ a Nafitali maarĩ: Jahazieli, na Guni, na Jezeri, na Shalumu; aya maarĩ a rũciaro rwa Biliha." 
1Chronicles7:14 Njiaro cia Manase ciarĩ: Asirieli, ũrĩa aaciarĩirwo nĩ thuriya yake ĩrĩa yarĩ Mũaramiti. Ningĩ thuriya ĩyo ĩkĩmũciarĩra Makiru, ũrĩa warĩ ithe wa Gileadi." 
1Chronicles7:15 Makiru aahikanirie kuuma kwa Ahupimu na Ashupimu. Mwarĩ wa nyina eetagwo Maaka. Ũrĩa ũngĩ wa rũciaro rwake eetagwo Zelofehadi, nake aaciarĩte o airĩtu." 
1Chronicles7:16 Mũtumia wa Makiru, Maaka nĩaciarire mwanake na akĩmũtua Pereshu. Mũrũ wa nyina na Pereshu eetagwo Shereshu, na ariũ a Shereshu maarĩ Ulamu na Rakemu." 
1Chronicles7:17 Mũriũ wa Ulamu eetagwo: Bedani. Acio nĩo maarĩ ariũ a Gileadi mũrũ wa Makiru, mũrũ wa Manase." 
1Chronicles7:18 Mwarĩ wa nyina Hamolekethu nĩaciarire Ishihodi, na Abiezeri, na Mahala." 
1Chronicles7:19 Ariũ a Shemida maarĩ: Ahiani, na Shekemu, na Liki, na Aniamu." 
1Chronicles7:20 Njiaro cia Efiraimu ciarĩ: Shuthela na mũriũ Beredi, na Tahathu mũriũ wa Beredi, na Eleada mũriũ wa Tahathu, na Tahathu mũriũ wa Eleada, na mũriũ Zabadi, na Shuthela mũriũ wa Zabadi," 
1Chronicles7:21 na Zabadi aarĩ mũriũ wa Tahathu, nake Shuthela aarĩ mũriũ wa Zabadi. Ezeri na Eleadi mooragirwo nĩ andũ arĩa maaciarĩirwo Gathi hĩndĩ ĩrĩa maathiĩte gũtaha mahiũ mao." 
1Chronicles7:22 Ithe wao Efiraimu nĩamacakaĩire mĩthenya mĩingĩ, nao andũ ao magĩũka kũmũhooreria." 
1Chronicles7:23 Ningĩ agĩkoma na mũtumia wake rĩngĩ, nake akĩgĩa nda agĩciara kahĩĩ. Nake agĩgatua Beria, tondũ nĩ gwakoretwo na mũtino thĩinĩ wa nyũmba yake." 
1Chronicles7:24 Mwarĩ wa Efiraimu eetagwo Sheera, ũrĩa waakire Bethi-Horoni ya kĩanda na ya rũgongo, na agĩaka Uzeni-Sheera." 
1Chronicles7:25 Refa aarĩ mũriũ wa Efiraimu, na mũriũ eetagwo Resefu, na Tela mũriũ wa Resefu, na Tahani mũriũ wa Tela," 
1Chronicles7:26 na Ladani mũriũ wa Tahani, na Amihudu mũriũ wa Ladani, na Elishama mũriũ wa Amihudu," 
1Chronicles7:27 na Nuni mũriũ wa Elishama, na Joshua mũriũ wa Nuni." 
1Chronicles7:27 na Nuni mũriũ wa Elishama, na Joshua mũriũ wa Nuni." 
1Chronicles7:28 Ithaka na ciikaro ciao ciarĩ Betheli, na matũũra marĩa maakũrigiicĩirie, na nĩ Naara mwena wa irathĩro, na Gezeri na matũũra makuo ma mwena wa ithũĩro, na Shekemu na matũũra makuo, nginya Gaza na matũũra makuo." 
1Chronicles7:29 Kũrigania na mĩhaka ya Manase maarĩ na Bathi-Shani, na Taanaka, na Megido, na Dori, hamwe na matũũra makuo. Njiaro cia Jusufu mũrũ wa Isiraeli nĩcio ciaikaraga matũũra macio." 
1Chronicles7:30 Ariũ a Asheri maarĩ: Imuna, na Ishiva, na Ishivi, na Beria. Mwarĩ wa nyina wao eetagwo Sera." 
1Chronicles7:31 Ariũ a Beria maarĩ: Heberi na Malikieli ũrĩa warĩ ithe wa Birizaithu. 
1Chronicles7:32 Heberi nĩwe warĩ ithe wa Jefileti, na Shomeri, na Hothamu, na mwarĩ wa nyina wao eetagwo Shua." 
1Chronicles7:33 Ariũ a Jafileti maarĩ: Pasaka, na Bimihali, na Ashavathu. Acio maarĩ ariũ a Jefileti." 
1Chronicles7:34 Ariũ a Shomeri maarĩ: Ahi, na Rohaga, na Jehuba, na Aramu." 
1Chronicles7:35 Ariũ a mũrũ wa nyina na Helemu maarĩ: Zofa, na Imuna, na Sheleshu, na Amali." 
1Chronicles7:36 Ariũ a Zofa maarĩ: Sua, na Harineferi, na Shuali, na Beri, na Imura," 
1Chronicles7:37 na Bezeri, na Hodi, na Shama, na Shilisha, na Ithirani, na Beera." 
1Chronicles7:38 Ariũ a Jetheri maarĩ: Jefune, na Pisipa, na Ara." 
1Chronicles7:39 Ariũ a Ula maarĩ: Ara, na Hanieli, na Rizia." 
1Chronicles7:40 Acio othe maarĩ njiaro cia Asheri; nĩo maarĩ atongoria a nyũmba ciao, na andũ athuure, na njamba cia ita, na atongoria arĩa maarĩ igweta. Mũigana wa andũ arĩa maangĩathiire mbaara kũringana na maandĩko ma njiarwa ciao maarĩ 26,000." 
1Chronicles8:1 Benjamini nĩwe warĩ ithe wa Bela, mũriũ wake wa irigithathi; Ashibeli aarĩ mũriũ wa keerĩ, nake Ahara wa gatatũ," 
1Chronicles8:2 nake Noha wa kana, nake Rafa wa gatano." 
1Chronicles8:3 Ariũ a Bela maarĩ: Adari, na Gera, na Abihudi," 
1Chronicles8:4 na Abishua, na Naamani, na Ahoa," 
1Chronicles8:5 na Gera, na Shefufani, na Huramu." 
1Chronicles8:6 Aya nĩo maarĩ njiaro cia Ehudu, arĩa maarĩ atongoria a nyũmba cia arĩa maatũũraga Geba, na nĩo maathaamĩirio Manahathu:" 
1Chronicles8:7 Naamani, na Ahija, na Gera ũrĩa wamathaamirie, na nĩwe warĩ ithe wa Uza na Ahihudu." 
1Chronicles8:8 Shaharaimu nĩaciarĩirwo ciana kũu Moabi thuutha wa gũte atumia ake Hushimu na Baara. 
1Chronicles8:9 Mũtumia wake Hodeshu akĩmũciarĩra ciana ici: Jobabu, na Zibia, na Mesha, na Malikamu," 
1Chronicles8:9 Mũtumia wake Hodeshu akĩmũciarĩra ciana ici: Jobabu, na Zibia, na Mesha, na Malikamu," 
1Chronicles8:10 na Jeuzu, na Shakia, na Mirima. Acio nĩo maarĩ ariũ ake, na maarĩ atongoria a nyũmba ciao." 
1Chronicles8:11 Mũtumia wake Hushimu akĩmũciarĩra Ahitubu na Elipaali. 
1Chronicles8:12 Ariũ a Elipaali maarĩ: Eberi, na Mishamu, na Shemedi (ũrĩa wakire Ono, o na Lodi na matũũra marĩa maakũrigiicĩirie)," 
1Chronicles8:13 na Beria, na Shema arĩa maarĩ atongoria a nyũmba cia arĩa maatũũraga Aijaloni, na nĩo maingatire andũ arĩa maatũũraga Gathu." 
1Chronicles8:14 Ahio, na Shashaka, na Jeremothu," 
1Chronicles8:15 na Zebadia, na Aradi, na Ederi," 
1Chronicles8:16 na Mikaeli, na Ishipa, na Joha maarĩ ariũ a Beria." 
1Chronicles8:17 Zebadia, na Meshulamu, na Hiziki, na Heberi," 
1Chronicles8:18 na Ishimerai, na Izilia, na Jababu maarĩ ariũ a Elipaali." 
1Chronicles8:19 Jakimu, na Zikiri, na Zabedi," 
1Chronicles8:20 na Elienai, na Zilethai, na Elieli," 
1Chronicles8:21 na Adaia, na Beraia, na Shimirathu maarĩ ariũ a Shimei." 
1Chronicles8:22 Ishipani, na Eberi, na Elieli," 
1Chronicles8:23 na Abidoni, na Zikiri, na Hanani," 
1Chronicles8:24 na Hanania, na Elamu, na Anithothija," 
1Chronicles8:25 na Ifĩdeia, na Penueli maarĩ ariũ a Shashaka." 
1Chronicles8:26 Shamusherai, na Sheharia, na Athalia," 
1Chronicles8:27 na Jaareshia, na Elija, na Zikiri maarĩ ariũ a Jerohamu." 
1Chronicles8:28 Aya othe maarĩ atongoria a nyũmba o na anene, ta ũrĩa maandĩkĩtwo maandĩko-inĩ ma njiarwa ciao, na maaikaraga Jerusalemu." 
1Chronicles8:29 Jeieli ithe wa Gibeoni aatũũraga Gibeoni. Mũtumia wake eetagwo Maaka," 
1Chronicles8:30 na mũriũ wake wa irigithathi eetagwo Abidoni, akarũmĩrĩrwo nĩ Zuru, na Kishu, na Baali, na Neri, na Nadabu," 
1Chronicles8:31 na Gedori, na Ahio, na Zekeri," 
1Chronicles8:32 na Mikilothu ũrĩa warĩ ithe wa Shimea. O nao maaikaraga hakuhĩ na andũ ao kũu Jerusalemu. 
1Chronicles8:33 Neri aarĩ ithe wa Kishu, nake Kishu aarĩ ithe wa Saũlũ. Saũlũ aarĩ ithe wa Jonathani" 
1Chronicles8:34 Mũriũ wa Jonathani: eetagwo Meribu-Baali, na nĩwe warĩ ithe wa Mika." 
1Chronicles8:35 Ariũ a Mika maarĩ: Pithoni, na Meleku, na Tarea, na Ahazu." 
1Chronicles8:36 Ahazu aarĩ ithe wa Jehoada, nake Jehoada aarĩ ithe wa Alemethu, na Azamavethu, na Zimuri; nake Zimuri aarĩ ithe wa Moza." 
1Chronicles8:37 Moza aarĩ ithe wa Binea; nake Rafa aarĩ mũriũ wa Binea, nake Eleasa aarĩ mũriũ wa Rafa, nake Azeli aarĩ mũriũ wa Eleasa." 
1Chronicles8:38 Azeli aarĩ na ariũ atandatũ, na maya nĩmo marĩĩtwa mao: Azirikamu, na Bokeru, na Ishumaeli, na Shearia, na Obadia, na Hanani. Acio nĩo maarĩ ariũ a Azeli." 
1Chronicles8:39 Ariũ a Esheku, mũrũ wa nyina, maarĩ: Ulamu irigithathi rĩake, na Jeushu wa keerĩ, na Elifeleti wa gatatũ." 
1Chronicles8:40 Ariũ a Ulamu maarĩ njamba cia ita, na nĩmamenyete gũtũmĩra ũta. Maarĩ na ariũ aingĩ o na ciana cia ciana ciao, na othe maarĩ 150. Acio othe nĩo maarĩ njiaro cia Benjamini." 
1Chronicles9:1 Andũ a Isiraeli othe nĩmandĩkĩtwo maandĩko-inĩ ma njiarwa marĩa maarĩ mbuku-inĩ ya athamaki a Isiraeli. Andũ a Juda nĩmatahĩtwo magatwarwo Babuloni nĩ ũndũ wa kwaga kwĩhokeka. 
1Chronicles9:2 Na rĩrĩ, andũ arĩa maambire gũcooka gũikara mĩgũnda-inĩ yao o kũu matũũra-inĩ mao, maarĩ andũ amwe a Isiraeli, na athĩnjĩri-Ngai, na Alawii, na ndungata cia hekarũ." 
1Chronicles9:3 Andũ arĩa maatũũraga Jerusalemu kuuma Juda, na Benjamini, na Efiraimu, na Manase maarĩ:" 
1Chronicles9:4 Uthai mũrũ wa Amihudu, mũrũ wa Omuri, mũrũ wa Imuri, mũrũ wa Bani wa rũciaro rwa Perezu mũrũ wa Juda." 
1Chronicles9:5 Andũ a Shiloni maarĩ: Asaia ũrĩa warĩ irigithathi, na ariũ ake." 
1Chronicles9:6 Kuuma Zera aarĩ: Jeueli. Andũ othe a kuuma Juda maarĩ 690. 
1Chronicles9:7 Andũ a Benjamini maarĩ: Salu mũrũ wa Meshulamu, mũrũ wa Hodavia, mũrũ wa Hasenua;" 
1Chronicles9:8 na Ibineia mũrũ wa Jerohamu; Ela mũrũ wa Uzi, mũrũ wa Mikiri; na Meshulamu mũrũ wa Shefatia, mũrũ wa Reueli, mũrũ wa Ibinija." 
1Chronicles9:9 Andũ a kuuma Benjamini, ta ũrĩa maandĩkĩtwo maandĩko-inĩ ma njiarwa ciao, maarĩ 956. Arũme acio othe maarĩ atongoria a nyũmba ciao." 
1Chronicles9:10 Athĩnjĩri-Ngai maarĩ: Jedaia, na Jehoiaribu, na Jakini;" 
1Chronicles9:11 na Azaria mũrũ wa Hilikia, mũrũ wa Meshulamu, mũrũ wa Zadoku, mũrũ wa Meraiothu, mũrũ wa Ahitubu ũrĩa warĩ mũmenyereri mũnene wa nyũmba ya Ngai;" 
1Chronicles9:12 na Adaia mũrũ wa Jerohamu, mũrũ wa Pashuru, mũrũ wa Malikija; na Maasai mũrũ wa Adieli, mũrũ wa Jahazera, mũrũ wa Meshulamu, mũrũ wa Meshilemithu, mũrũ wa Imeri." 
1Chronicles9:13 Athĩnjĩri-Ngai arĩa maarĩ atongoria a nyũmba ciao maarĩ 1,760. Maarĩ arũme maarĩ na ũhoti, na nĩ meehokeirwo gũtungata nyũmba-inĩ ya Ngai." 
1Chronicles9:14 Alawii maarĩ: Shemaia mũrũ wa Hashubu, mũrũ wa Azirikamu, mũrũ wa Hashabia ũrĩa Mũmerari," 
1Chronicles9:15 na Bakabakari, na Hereshi, na Galali, na Matania mũrũ wa Mika, mũrũ wa Zikiri, mũrũ wa Asafu;" 
1Chronicles9:16 na Obadia mũrũ wa Shemaia, mũrũ wa Galali, mũrũ wa Jeduthuni; na Berekia mũrũ wa Asa, mũrũ wa Elikana, arĩa maaikaraga matũũra-inĩ ma Anetofathi." 
1Chronicles9:17 Arangĩri a ihingo maarĩ: Shalumu, na Akubu, na Talimoni, na Ahimani na ariũ a nyina, na Shalumu mũnene wao," 
1Chronicles9:18 acio maigĩtwo kĩhingo-inĩ kĩa mũthamaki mwena wa irathĩro, nginya ihinda-inĩ rĩu. Acio nĩo maarĩ arangĩri a ihingo a gĩkundi kĩa Alawii." 
1Chronicles9:19 Shalumu mũrũ wa Kore, mũrũ wa Ebiasafu, mũrũ wa Kora, na athiritũ ake arangĩri a ihingo kuuma nyũmba yake ya Akohathu. Acio nĩo meehokeirwo ũrangĩri wa itoonyero rĩa hema o ta ũrĩa maithe mao meehokeirwo ũrangĩri wa itoonyero rĩa Gĩikaro kĩa Jehova." 
1Chronicles9:20 Mahinda ma mbere Finehasi mũrũ wa Eleazaru nĩwe warũgamagĩrĩra arangĩri a ihingo, nake Jehova aarĩ hamwe nake." 
1Chronicles9:21 Zekaria mũrũ wa Meshelemia nĩwe warĩ mũrangĩri wa itoonyero rĩa Hema-ya-Gũtũnganwo. 
1Chronicles9:22 Arĩa othe maathuurĩtwo matuĩke arangĩri a ihingo maarĩ 212. Marĩĩtwa mao nĩmandĩkirwo maandĩko-inĩ ma njiarwa ciao, matũũra-inĩ mao. Arangĩri a ihingo maigirwo o mũndũ harĩa ehokeirwo nĩ Daudi na Samũeli ũrĩa muoni-maũndũ." 
1Chronicles9:23 O ene na njiaro ciao nĩo maarũgamagĩrĩra ũrangĩri wa ihingo cia nyũmba ya Jehova, nyũmba ĩrĩa yetagwo Hema." 
1Chronicles9:24 Arangĩri a ihingo maarĩ mĩena yothe ĩna: irathĩro, na ithũĩro, na gathigathini, na gũthini." 
1Chronicles9:25 Ariũ a ithe wao a matũũra mao nĩmookaga rĩmwe na rĩmwe magateithania mawĩra nao ihinda rĩa mĩthenya mũgwanja. 
1Chronicles9:26 No anene arĩa ana maaroraga arangĩri a ihingo, arĩa maarĩ Alawii, nĩmehokeirwo kũmenyerera tũnyũmba na igĩĩna cia nyũmba ya Ngai." 
1Chronicles9:27 Maikaraga ũtukũ wothe hakuhĩ na nyũmba ya Ngai nĩgeetha mamĩrangagĩre; na nĩo maamenyagĩrĩra cabi ya kũmĩhingũra o rũciinĩ. 
1Chronicles9:28 Amwe ao maarĩ amenyereri a indo iria ciatũmagĩrwo ũtungata-inĩ wa hekarũ; nĩmacitaraga ikĩrutwo na igĩcookio nyũmba thĩinĩ. 
1Chronicles9:29 Angĩ maaheetwo wĩra wa kũmenyerera indo cia nyũmba na indo iria ingĩ ciothe ciakoragwo handũ-harĩa-haamũre, o hamwe na mũtu, na ndibei, na maguta, na ũbani, na mahuti marĩa manungi wega." 
1Chronicles9:30 No athĩnjĩri-Ngai amwe nĩo maarutaga wĩra wa gũtukania mahuti macio manungi wega. 
1Chronicles9:31 Mũlawii wetagwo Matithia, irigithathi rĩa Shalumu ũrĩa Mũkoora, nĩwe wehokeirwo wĩra wa gũthondeka mĩgate ya maruta." 
1Chronicles9:32 Ariũ a ithe amwe ao a mũhĩrĩga wa Kohathu nĩo marũgamagĩrĩra ũthondeki wa mĩgate ya kũigĩrĩrwo metha-inĩ hĩndĩ ya thabatũ. 
1Chronicles9:33 Arĩa maarĩ aini, na atongoria a nyũmba cia Alawii, maaikaraga tũnyũmba-inĩ kũu hekarũ thĩinĩ na matiarutaga mawĩra mangĩ tondũ maarĩ a kũmenyerera wĩra ũcio wao mũthenya na ũtukũ." 
1Chronicles9:34 Acio othe maarĩ atongoria a nyũmba cia Alawii, na anene o ta ũrĩa maandĩkĩtwo ibuku-inĩ rĩa njiarwa ciao, nao maatũũraga Jerusalemu." 
1Chronicles9:35 Jeieli ithe wa Gibeoni aatũũraga Gibeoni. Mũtumia wake eetagwo Maaka," 
1Chronicles9:36 na mũriũ wake wa irigithathi eetagwo Abidoni, akarũmĩrĩrwo nĩ Zuru, na Kishu, na Baali, na Neri, na Nadabu," 
1Chronicles9:37 na Gedori, na Ahio, na Zekaria, na Mikilothu." 
1Chronicles9:38 Mikilothu nĩwe warĩ ithe wa Shimeami. O nao maikaraga hakuhĩ na andũ ao kũu Jerusalemu. 
1Chronicles9:39 Neri aarĩ ithe wa Kishu, nake Kishu aarĩ ithe wa Saũlũ, nake Saũlũ aarĩ ithe wa Jonathani, na Maliki-Shua, na Abinadabu, na Eshi-Baali." 
1Chronicles9:40 Mũriũ wa Jonathani eetagwo Meribu-Baali, na nĩwe warĩ ithe wa Mika." 
1Chronicles9:41 Ariũ a Mika maarĩ: Pithoni, na Meleku, na Taharea, na Ahazu." 
1Chronicles9:42 Ahazu aarĩ ithe wa Jara, nake Jara aarĩ ithe wa Alemethu, na Azimavethu, na Zimuri, nake Zimuri aarĩ ithe wa Moza." 
1Chronicles9:43 Moza aarĩ ithe wa Binea, nake Refaia aarĩ mũriũ wa Binea, nake Eleasa aarĩ mũriũ wa Refaia, nake Azeli aarĩ mũriũ wa Eleasa." 
1Chronicles9:44 Azeli aarĩ na ariũ atandatũ, na maya nĩmo marĩĩtwa mao: Azirikamu, na Bokeru, na Ishumaeli, na Shearia, na Obadia, na Hanani. Acio nĩo maarĩ ariũ a Azeli." 
1Chronicles10:1 Na rĩrĩ, Afilisti nĩmarũire na Isiraeli; nao andũ a Isiraeli makĩmoorĩra, na aingĩ ao makĩũragĩrwo Kĩrĩma-inĩ kĩa Giliboa." 
1Chronicles10:2 Afilisti makĩhatĩrĩria Saũlũ na ariũ ake mũno, na makĩũraga ariũ ake Jonathani, na Abinadabu, na Maliki-Shua." 
1Chronicles10:3 Na rĩrĩ, mbaara nĩyaneneheire Saũlũ mũno, na hĩndĩ ĩrĩa aikia a mĩguĩ maamũkinyĩrire, makĩmũguraria." 
1Chronicles10:4 Nake Saũlũ akĩĩra mũkuui wa indo ciake cia mbaara atĩrĩ, “Comora rũhiũ rwaku rwa njora ũũthece naruo, nĩguo andũ aya mataruaga matigooke kũnyararithia.” No mũndũ ũcio mũkuui wa indo ciake cia mbaara agĩĩtigĩra mũno, akĩrega gwĩka ũguo; nĩ ũndũ ũcio Saũlũ akĩoya rũhiũ rwake rwa njora, akĩrũgwĩra." 
1Chronicles10:5 Rĩrĩa mũkuui wa indo cia mbaara onire atĩ Saũlũ nĩakua, o nake akĩgwĩra rũhiũ rwake rwa njora, agĩkua." 
1Chronicles10:6 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Saũlũ na ariũ ake atatũ magĩkua, nao andũ othe a nyũmba yake magĩgĩkua o hamwe." 
1Chronicles10:7 Rĩrĩa andũ a Isiraeli othe arĩa maarĩ kĩanda moonire atĩ ita nĩrĩorĩte, na atĩ Saũlũ na ariũ ake nĩmakuĩte-rĩ, magĩtiganĩria matũũra mao, makĩũra; nao Afilisti magĩthiĩ magĩikara kuo." 
1Chronicles10:8 Mũthenya ũyũ ũngĩ, Afilisti magĩthiĩ gũcuuma ciimba, magĩkora Saũlũ na ariũ ake makuĩte kũu Kĩrĩma-inĩ kĩa Giliboa." 
1Chronicles10:9 Makĩmũbora, na magĩkuua mũtwe wake, na indo ciake cia mbaara; magĩcooka magĩtũma andũ mathiĩ bũrũri wothe wa Afilisti makaanĩrĩre ũhoro ũcio kũrĩ mĩhianano yao ya kũhooywo, na kũrĩ andũ ao." 
1Chronicles10:10 Makĩiga indo cia Saũlũ cia mbaara thĩinĩ wa hekarũ ya ngai ciao, naguo mũtwe wake makĩwoherera kũu hekarũ ya Dagoni." 
1Chronicles10:11 No rĩrĩa andũ a Jabeshi-Gileadi maaiguire ũhoro wa maũndũ marĩa mothe Afilisti meekĩte Saũlũ-rĩ," 
1Chronicles10:12 njamba ciao cia ita igĩthiĩ, igĩkuua mĩĩrĩ ya Saũlũ na ya ariũ ake, ikĩmĩrehe Jabeshi. Magĩcooka magĩthika mahĩndĩ mao gĩtina-inĩ kĩa mũtĩ ũrĩa mũnene kũu Jabeshi, na makĩĩhinga kũrĩa irio mĩthenya mũgwanja." 
1Chronicles10:13 Saũlũ aakuire nĩ ũndũ ndaarĩ mwĩhokeku kũrĩ Jehova; ndaamenyereire kiugo kĩa Jehova, o na nĩahooire kĩrĩra kuuma kũrĩ mũragũri atĩ amũtongorie," 
1Chronicles10:14 no ndahooire kĩrĩra kũrĩ Jehova. Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Jehova akĩmũũraga, na akĩneana ũthamaki kũrĩ Daudi mũrũ wa Jesii." 
1Chronicles11:1 Hĩndĩ ĩyo andũ othe a Isiraeli magĩcookanĩrĩra harĩ Daudi kũu Hebironi, makĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Ithuĩ tũrĩ a mũthiimo na thakame yaku." 
1Chronicles11:2 Ihinda rĩrĩa rĩhĩtũkĩte, o na Saũlũ arĩ o mũthamaki, wee nĩwe ũratongoragia Isiraeli mbaara-inĩ ciao. Nake Jehova Ngai waku agĩkwĩra atĩrĩ, ‘Nĩwe ũkaarĩithia andũ akwa Isiraeli, na nĩũgatuĩka mwathi wao.’ ”" 
1Chronicles11:3 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio athuuri othe a Isiraeli magĩthiĩ Hebironi kũrĩ Mũthamaki Daudi, nake Daudi akĩgĩa na kĩrĩkanĩro nao mbere ya Jehova o kũu Hebironi, nao magĩitĩrĩria Daudi maguta mũtwe atuĩke mũthamaki wa Isiraeli, o ta ũrĩa Jehova eranĩire na kanua ga Samũeli." 
1Chronicles11:4 Daudi hamwe na andũ a Isiraeli othe magĩthiĩ gũtharĩkĩra Jerusalemu, o kũu gwetagwo Jebusi. Nao Ajebusi arĩa maatũũraga kũu" 
1Chronicles11:5 makĩĩra Daudi atĩrĩ, “Ndũngĩtoonya gũkũ.” No rĩrĩ, Daudi nĩagĩtunyanire gĩikaro kĩu kĩairigĩirwo na thingo cia hinya gĩa Zayuni, Itũũra Inene rĩa Daudi." 
1Chronicles11:6 Daudi oigĩte atĩrĩ, “Ũrĩa wothe ũgũtongoria mbaara ya kũhũũra Ajebusi nĩwe ũgaatuĩka mũnene wa thigari ciothe.” Joabu mũrũ wa Zeruia nĩwe waambire kwambata, na nĩ ũndũ ũcio nĩwe watuĩkire mũnene wa thigari." 
1Chronicles11:7 Daudi agĩgĩtũũra gĩikaro kĩu kĩairigĩirwo na rũthingo rwa hinya, na nĩ ũndũ ũcio gĩgĩtwo Itũũra Inene rĩa Daudi." 
1Chronicles11:8 Nake agĩaka itũũra inene rĩthiũrũrũkĩirie gĩikaro kĩu, kuuma benji-inĩ nginya rũthingo-inĩ rũrĩa rwakĩrigiicĩirie, nake Joabu agĩcookereria mĩena ĩrĩa ĩngĩ ya itũũra rĩu inene." 
1Chronicles11:9 Daudi agĩkĩrĩrĩria kũgĩa na ũhoti mũingĩ, tondũ Jehova Mwene-Hinya-Wothe aarĩ hamwe nake." 
1Chronicles11:10 Aya nĩo maarĩ anene a andũ arĩa njamba a Daudi, o ene hamwe na andũ a Isiraeli othe, nĩmatirĩrĩire ũthamaki wake na hinya nĩguo ũtheereme bũrũri wothe, o ta ũrĩa Jehova eeranĩire." 
1Chronicles11:11 Maya nĩmo marĩĩtwa ma andũ acio maarĩ njamba a Daudi: Jashobeamu ũrĩa Mũhakimoni nake aarĩ mũtongoria wa anene; nĩwe woire itimũ rĩake ahũũrane na andũ 300, nake akĩmooraga mbaara-inĩ ĩmwe." 
1Chronicles11:12 Mũnini wake eetagwo Eleazaru mũrũ wa Dodo ũrĩa Mũahohi, ũmwe wa andũ atatũ arĩa maarĩ njamba." 
1Chronicles11:13 Nake aarĩ hamwe na Daudi kũu Pasi-Damimu hĩndĩ ĩrĩa Afilisti moonganĩte marũe nao. Maarĩ handũ haarĩ mũgũnda waiyũire cairi, nacio thigari ikĩũrĩra Afilisti." 
1Chronicles11:14 No-o nĩmaregeire gatagatĩ ka mũgũnda ũcio. Makĩũgitĩra, na makĩũraga Afilisti, nake Jehova akĩmahe ũhootani mũnene." 
1Chronicles11:15 Anene atatũ a acio mĩrongo ĩtatũ, nĩmaikũrũkire magĩthiĩ kũrĩ Daudi ihiga-inĩ rĩrĩa rĩarĩ ngurunga-inĩ ya Adulamu, hĩndĩ ĩrĩa mbũtũ ya Afilisti yaambĩte hema Kĩanda kĩa Refaimu." 
1Chronicles11:16 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Daudi aarĩ kĩĩhitho-inĩ kĩrũmu nayo mbũtũ ya Afilisti yarĩ Bethilehemu. 
1Chronicles11:17 Daudi akĩĩrirĩria maaĩ, akiuga atĩrĩ, “Naarĩ korwo kũrĩ mũndũ ũngĩndehera maaĩ ma kũnyua kuuma gĩthima-inĩ kĩrĩa kĩrĩ hakuhĩ na kĩhingo kĩa Bethilehemu!”" 
1Chronicles11:18 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio andũ acio atatũ magĩtuĩkanĩria gatagatĩ ka ita rĩa Afilisti, magĩtaha maaĩ gĩthima-inĩ kĩu kĩarĩ hakuhĩ na kĩhingo kĩa Bethilehemu, na makĩmatwarĩra Daudi. No Daudi akĩrega kũmanyua; akĩmaita mbere ya Jehova." 
1Chronicles11:19 Akiuga atĩrĩ, “Ngai arogiria njĩke ũguo! No ngĩnyue thakame ya andũ aya mathiĩrĩire ũgwati-inĩ wa gĩkuũ?” Tondũ nĩmathiĩrĩire ũgwati-inĩ wa gĩkuũ nĩguo mamarehe-rĩ, Daudi akĩrega kũmanyua. Maũndũ ta macio nĩmo meekagwo nĩ njamba icio ithatũ." 
1Chronicles11:20 Abishai mũrũ wa nyina na Joabu nĩwe warĩ mũnene wa acio Atatũ. Nake akĩoya itimũ rĩake, agĩtharĩkĩra andũ magana matatũ, akĩmooraga, nĩ ũndũ ũcio akĩgĩa igweta o ta acio Atatũ." 
1Chronicles11:21 Nĩatĩĩkire mũno gũkĩra acio angĩ Atatũ na agĩtuĩka mwathi wao o na gũtuĩka ndaataranĩirio nao. 
1Chronicles11:22 Benaia mũrũ wa Jehoiada aarĩ mũrũi njamba wa kuuma Kabizeeli, ũrĩa wekire maũndũ manene ma ũcamba. Nĩooragire njamba nene igĩrĩ cia ita cia Moabi. Ningĩ nĩatoonyire irima mũthenya warĩ na tharunji, na akĩũraga mũrũũthi." 
1Chronicles11:23 Na nĩooragire Mũmisiri warĩ wa ũraihu wa buti mũgwanja na nuthu. O na gũtuĩka Mũmisiri ũcio nĩanyiitĩte itimũ rĩaiganaga ta mũtĩ wa mũtumi ngoora, Benaia akĩmũtharĩkĩra na njũgũma. Akĩhuria itimũ kuuma guoko-inĩ kwa Mũmisiri ũcio, na akĩmũũraga na itimũ rĩu rĩake." 
1Chronicles11:24 Macio nĩmo maũndũ ma ũcamba marĩa mekirwo nĩ Benaia mũrũ wa Jehoiada. O nake aarĩ igweta o ta andũ arĩa atatũ maarĩ njamba. 
1Chronicles11:25 Nĩatĩĩtwo gũkĩra arĩa Mĩrongo Ĩtatũ, no ndaataranĩirio na acio Atatũ. Nake Daudi akĩmũtua mũnene wa arĩa maamũrangagĩra." 
1Chronicles11:26 Andũ arĩa maarĩ njamba maarĩ: Asaheli mũrũ wa nyina na Joabu, na Elihanani mũrũ wa Dodo wa kuuma Bethilehemu," 
1Chronicles11:27 na Shamothu ũrĩa Mũharori, na Helezu ũrĩa Mũpeloni," 
1Chronicles11:28 na Ira mũrũ wa Ikeshu kuuma Tekoa, na Abiezeri kuuma Anathothu," 
1Chronicles11:29 na Sibekai ũrĩa Mũhushathi, na Ilai ũrĩa Mũahohi," 
1Chronicles11:30 na Maharai ũrĩa Mũnetofathi, na Helebu mũrũ wa Baana ũrĩa Mũnetofathi," 
1Chronicles11:31 na Ithai mũrũ wa Ribai, wa kuuma Gibea kũu Benjamini, na Benaia ũrĩa Mũpirathoni," 
1Chronicles11:32 na Hurai kuuma tũrũũĩ-inĩ twa Gaashu, na Abieli ũrĩa Mũaribathi," 
1Chronicles11:33 na Azamavethu ũrĩa Mũbahurimu, na Eliahaba ũrĩa Mũshaaliboni," 
1Chronicles11:34 na ariũ a Hashemu ũrĩa Mũgizoni, na Jonathani mũrũ wa Shage ũrĩa Mũharari," 
1Chronicles11:35 na Ahiamu mũrũ wa Sakaru ũrĩa Mũharari, na Elifali mũrũ wa Uri," 
1Chronicles11:36 na Heferi ũrĩa Mũmekerathi, na Ahija ũrĩa Mũpeloni," 
1Chronicles11:37 na Hezoro ũrĩa Mũkarimeli, na Naarai mũrũ wa Ezibai," 
1Chronicles11:38 na Joeli mũrũ wa ithe na Nathani, na Mibihari mũrũ wa Hagari," 
1Chronicles11:38 na Joeli mũrũ wa ithe na Nathani, na Mibihari mũrũ wa Hagari," 
1Chronicles11:39 na Zeleku ũrĩa Mũamoni, na Naharai ũrĩa Mũberothi, ũrĩa wakuuagĩra Joabu mũrũ wa Zeruia indo cia mbaara," 
1Chronicles11:40 na Ira ũrĩa Mũithiri, na Garebu ũrĩa Mũithiri," 
1Chronicles11:41 na Uria ũrĩa Mũhiti, na Zabadi mũrũ wa Ahalai," 
1Chronicles11:42 na Adina mũrũ wa Shiza ũrĩa Mũrubeni, ũrĩa warĩ mũnene wa Arubeni, arĩ na andũ mĩrongo ĩtatũ arĩa maarĩ nake," 
1Chronicles11:43 na Hanani mũrũ wa Maaka, na Joshafatu ũrĩa Mũmithini," 
1Chronicles11:44 na Uzia ũrĩa Mũashiterathi, na Shama na Jeieli, ariũ a Hothamu ũrĩa Mũaroeri," 
1Chronicles11:45 na Jediaeli mũrũ wa Shimuri, o na Joha mũrũ wa ithe ũrĩa Mũtizi," 
1Chronicles11:46 na Elieli ũrĩa Mũmahavi, na Jeribai na Joshavia, ariũ a Elinaamu, na Ithima ũrĩa Mũmoabi," 
1Chronicles11:47 na Elieli, na Obedi, na Jaasieli ũrĩa Mũmezobai." 
1Chronicles12:1 Aya nĩo andũ arĩa mookire kũrĩ Daudi arĩ kũu Zikilagi, hĩndĩ ĩrĩa aaingatĩtwo akehera maitho-inĩ ma Saũlũ mũrũ wa Kishu (maarĩ amwe a njamba cia ita iria ciamũteithirie mbaara-inĩ;" 
1Chronicles12:2 Nao maakuuaga mota na nĩmooĩ gũikia mĩguĩ, na gũikia mahiga na kĩgũtha, na guoko kwa ũrĩo kana kwa ũmotho; maarĩ a mbarĩ ĩmwe na Saũlũ kuuma mũhĩrĩga wa Benjamini), nao maarĩ:" 
1Chronicles12:3 Ahiezeri ũrĩa warĩ mũnene wao na Joashu, ariũ a Shemaa ũrĩa Mũgibea; na Jezieli, na Peleti, ariũ a Azimavethu; na Beraka, na Jehu ũrĩa Mũanathothu," 
1Chronicles12:4 na Ishimaia ũrĩa Mũgibeoni, mũndũ warĩ njamba thĩinĩ wa andũ arĩa Mĩrongo Ĩtatũ, nake aarĩ mũtongoria ũmwe thĩinĩ wa acio Mĩrongo Ĩtatũ; na Jeremia, na Jahazieli, na Johanani, na Jozabadu ũrĩa Mũgederathi," 
1Chronicles12:5 na Eluzai, na Jerimothu, na Bealia, na Shemaria, na Shefatia ũrĩa Mũharufi;" 
1Chronicles12:6 na Elikana, na Ishia, na Azareli, na Joezeru, na Jashobeamu arĩa maarĩ a mbarĩ ya Kora;" 
1Chronicles12:7 na Joela, na Zebadia, ariũ a Jerohamu kuuma Gedori." 
1Chronicles12:7 na Joela, na Zebadia, ariũ a Jerohamu kuuma Gedori." 
1Chronicles12:8 Agadi amwe nĩmagarũrũkire magĩcooka mwena wa Daudi o kũu werũ-inĩ kĩĩhitho-inĩ gĩake. Maarĩ njamba cia ita irĩ ũrũme ciehaarĩirie gũthiĩ mbaara, na nĩmooĩ kũhũthĩra ngo na itimũ. Mothiũ mao maahaanaga ta mothiũ ma mĩrũũthi, na maarĩ ihenya ta thwariga irĩ irĩma-inĩ." 
1Chronicles12:9 Ezeri nĩwe warĩ mũnene wao, na Obadia aarĩ mũnini wake; nake Eliabu aarĩ wa gatatũ," 
1Chronicles12:10 na Mishimana aarĩ wa kana, na Jeremia aarĩ wa gatano," 
1Chronicles12:11 na Atai aarĩ wa gatandatũ, na Elieli aarĩ wa mũgwanja," 
1Chronicles12:12 na Johanani aarĩ wa kanana, na Elizabadu aarĩ wa kenda," 
1Chronicles12:13 na Jeremia aarĩ wa ikũmi, na Makabanai aarĩ wa ikũmi na ũmwe." 
1Chronicles12:14 Agadi acio maarĩ anene a mbũtũ cia ita; ũrĩa warĩ mũnini mũno wao aarũaga mbaara ĩrĩa ĩngĩarũirwo nĩ andũ igana, nake ũrĩa warĩ mũnene mũno wao aarũaga mbaara ĩrĩa ĩngĩarũirwo nĩ andũ ngiri ĩmwe." 
1Chronicles12:15 Nĩo maaringire Rũũĩ rwa Jorodani mweri wa mbere rĩrĩa rwaiyũrĩte nginya rũkoina hũgũrũrũ ciaruo ciothe, na makĩingatithia andũ arĩa othe maaikaraga cianda-inĩ cia mwena wa irathĩro na mwena wa ithũĩro." 
1Chronicles12:16 Andũ amwe a kuuma Benjamini na angĩ a kuuma Juda o nao magĩũka kũrĩ Daudi kũu kĩĩhitho-inĩ gĩake. 
1Chronicles12:17 Daudi agĩthiĩ kũmatũnga, akĩmeera atĩrĩ, “Angĩkorwo mũrooka kũrĩ niĩ na thayũ kũndeithia-rĩ, nĩndĩhaarĩirie kũmwamũkĩra tũtuĩke kĩndũ kĩmwe; no angĩkorwo mũũkĩte kũngunyanĩra kũrĩ thũ ciakwa o rĩrĩa itarenda haaro-rĩ, Ngai wa maithe maitũ arorora ũndũ ũcio na amũtuĩre ciira.”" 
1Chronicles12:18 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Roho agĩikũrũkĩra Amasai, mũnene wa arĩa Mĩrongo Ĩtatũ, akiuga atĩrĩ: “Tũrĩ aku, wee Daudi! Tũrĩ hamwe nawe, wee mũrũ wa Jesii! Ũrogaacĩra, ũgaacĩre ki, na arĩa magũteithagia marogaacĩra, nĩgũkorwo Ngai waku nĩegũgũteithia.” Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Daudi akĩmaamũkĩra na akĩmatua atongoria a mbũtũ ciake cia gũtharĩkĩra thũ." 
1Chronicles12:19 Andũ amwe a Manase nĩmagarũrũkire magĩthiĩ mwena wa Daudi rĩrĩa aathiire na Afilisti kũhũũrana na Saũlũ. (Daudi na andũ ake matiateithirie Afilisti, tondũ thuutha wa kwaranĩria, aathani ao nĩmamũingatire. Maamwĩrire atĩrĩ, “Tũkaarĩha na mĩoyo iitũ angĩgatũtiganĩria acookerere mwathi wake Saũlũ.”)" 
1Chronicles12:20 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa Daudi aathiire Zikilagi, aya nĩo andũ a Manase arĩa maagarũrũkire magĩthiĩ mwena wake: Adina, na Jozabadu, na Jediaeli, na Mikaeli, na Jozabadu, na Elihu, na Zilethai, atongoria a ikundi cia ngiri kũu Manase." 
1Chronicles12:21 Nĩmateithirie Daudi kuuma kũrĩ mbũtũ iria ciamũtharĩkĩire, nĩgũkorwo othe maarĩ njamba cia ita irĩ ũrũme, na maarĩ anene a ita ciake." 
1Chronicles12:22 Mũthenya o mũthenya andũ nĩmookaga gũteithia Daudi, o nginya akĩgĩa na mbũtũ nene, o ta mbũtũ ya Ngai." 
1Chronicles12:23 Ũyũ nĩguo mũigana wa andũ arĩa meehaarĩirie gũthiĩ mbaara arĩa maathiire Hebironi kũrĩ Daudi nĩgeetha magarũre ũthamaki wa Saũlũ, maũnengere Daudi, o ta ũrĩa Jehova oigĩte:" 
1Chronicles12:24 andũ a Juda arĩa meehaarĩirie kũrũa mbaara maakuĩte ngo na matimũ, maarĩ 6,800;" 
1Chronicles12:25 andũ a Simeoni arĩa njamba cia ita meehaarĩirie kũrũa mbaara, maarĩ 7,100;" 
1Chronicles12:26 andũ a Alawii maarĩ 4,600;" 
1Chronicles12:27 amwe ao maarĩ Jehoiada, mũtongoria wa nyũmba ya Harũni ũrĩa warĩ na andũ 3,700," 
1Chronicles12:28 na Zadoku, mwanake mũnini warĩ njamba ya ita ĩrĩ ũrũme, ũrĩa warĩ na anene a thigari mĩrongo ĩĩrĩ na eerĩ kuuma nyũmba yake;" 
1Chronicles12:29 andũ a Benjamini, na nĩo maarĩ a mbarĩ ĩmwe na Saũlũ, maarĩ 3,000; aingĩ ao maatũũrĩte maathĩkagĩra nyũmba ya Saũlũ, o nginya hĩndĩ ĩyo;" 
1Chronicles12:30 andũ a Efiraimu, njamba cia ita irĩ ũrũme na irĩ ngumo mĩhĩrĩga-inĩ yao, maarĩ 20,800;" 
1Chronicles12:31 andũ a nuthu ya mũhĩrĩga wa Manase, arĩa maagwetetwo na marĩĩtwa nĩguo mathiĩ matue Daudi mũthamaki, maarĩ 18,000;" 
1Chronicles12:32 andũ a Isakaru, arĩa maarĩ na ũmenyo wa mahinda, na makamenya ũrĩa Isiraeli magĩrĩirwo nĩ gwĩka, maarĩ anene 200 arĩa maathaga andũ othe a nyũmba ciao;" 
1Chronicles12:33 andũ a Zebuluni, thigari iria ciamenyerete mbaara, na nĩmehaarĩirie kũrũa mbaara me na mĩthemba yothe ya indo cia mbaara, nĩguo mateithie Daudi marĩ na ngoro ĩmwe, nao maarĩ 50,000;" 
1Chronicles12:34 andũ a Nafitali maarĩ anene 1,000 hamwe na andũ 37,000 arĩa makuuĩte ngo na matimũ;" 
1Chronicles12:35 andũ a Dani arĩa mehaarĩirie kũrũa mbaara, maarĩ 28,600;" 
1Chronicles12:36 andũ a Asheri, thigari iria ciamenyerete mbaara na mehaarĩirie kũrũa mbaara, maarĩ 40,000;" 
1Chronicles12:37 na kuuma mwena wa irathĩro wa Jorodani, andũ a Rubeni, na Gadi, na nuthu ya mũhĩrĩga wa Manase, marĩ na mĩthemba yothe ya indo cia mbaara, maarĩ 120,000." 
1Chronicles12:38 Acio othe maarĩ andũ a kũrũa arĩa meerutĩte gũtungata marĩ ita-inĩ. Magĩũka Hebironi marĩ na ngoro ĩmwe ya gũtua Daudi mũthamaki wa Isiraeli guothe. Andũ a Isiraeli arĩa angĩ othe o nao maarĩ na rĩciiria o rĩmwe rĩa gũtua Daudi mũthamaki. 
1Chronicles12:39 Andũ acio maikarire kũu na Daudi mĩthenya ĩtatũ makĩrĩa na makĩnyua, nĩgũkorwo andũ a nyũmba ciao nĩmaheanĩte irio nĩ ũndũ wao." 
1Chronicles12:40 O na ningĩ andũ arĩa maatũũraga hakuhĩ nao kuuma Isakaru, na Zebuluni, na Nafitali nĩmarehire irio ikuuĩtwo nĩ ndigiri, na ngamĩĩra, na nyũmbũ, na ndegwa. Nĩ kwarehetwo mũtu mũingĩ, na ngũmba cia ngũyũ na cia thabibũ nyũmũ, na ndibei, na maguta, na ngʼombe, na ngʼondu, nĩgũkorwo kwarĩ na gĩkeno kũu Isiraeli." 
1Chronicles13:1 Daudi nĩmagĩire ndundu na anene ake a ita, arĩa maathaga ikundi cia thigari ngiri na ikundi cia thigari igana." 
1Chronicles13:2 Ningĩ agĩcooka akĩĩra kĩũngano gĩothe gĩa Isiraeli atĩrĩ, “Mũngĩona kwagĩrĩire na angĩkorwo nĩ kwenda kwa Jehova Ngai witũ, nĩ tũtũme ũhoro kũndũ na kũndũ kũrĩ ariũ a ithe witũ arĩa angĩ marĩ kũndũ guothe ngʼongo-inĩ cia Isiraeli, o na kũrĩ athĩnjĩri-Ngai na Alawii arĩa me hamwe nao matũũra-inĩ mao na ũrĩithio-inĩ wao, moke manyiitanĩre na ithuĩ." 
1Chronicles13:3 Nĩtũrehei ithandũkũ rĩa kĩrĩkanĩro rĩa Ngai witũ tũrĩcookie kũrĩ ithuĩ, nĩgũkorwo tũtiatuĩragia ũhoro harĩ rĩo hĩndĩ ya ũthamaki wa Saũlũ.”" 
1Chronicles13:4 Kĩũngano gĩothe gĩgĩtĩkĩra gwĩka ũguo tondũ andũ othe nĩmoonire ũndũ ũcio nĩwagĩrĩire. 
1Chronicles13:5 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Daudi agĩcookanĩrĩria andũ a Isiraeli othe kuuma Rũũĩ rwa Shihoru kũu Misiri nginya Lebo-Hamathu, makagĩĩre ithandũkũ rĩa Ngai kuuma Kiriathu-Jearimu." 
1Chronicles13:6 Daudi na andũ a Isiraeli othe arĩa maarĩ nake magĩthiĩ Baala kũu Juda (nĩkuo Kiriathu-Jearimu) makagĩĩre ithandũkũ rĩa Jehova Ngai ũrĩa ũikarĩire gĩtĩ kĩa ũnene gatagatĩ ka makerubi, o ithandũkũ rĩu rĩĩtanĩtio na Rĩĩtwa rĩake." 
1Chronicles13:7 Makĩruta ithandũkũ rĩa Ngai kuuma nyũmba ya Abinadabu rĩkuuĩtwo na ikaari rĩerũ, rĩtongoretio nĩ Uza na Ahio." 
1Chronicles13:8 Daudi na andũ a Isiraeli othe magĩkũngũĩra na hinya wao wothe marĩ mbere ya Ngai, makĩinaga na inanda cia mũgeeto na cia kĩnũbi, na tũhembe, na thaani iria ihũũrithanagio ikagamba, na tũrumbeta." 
1Chronicles13:9 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa maakinyire kĩhuhĩro-inĩ kĩa ngano gĩa Kidoni, Uza agĩtambũrũkia guoko nĩguo anyiitĩrĩre ithandũkũ rĩu rĩa kĩrĩkanĩro, tondũ ndegwa nĩciahĩngirwo." 
1Chronicles13:10 Na rĩrĩ, marakara ma Jehova nĩmakanĩire Uza, akĩmũgũtha, akĩgũa tondũ nĩanyiitire ithandũkũ rĩu na guoko. Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Uza agĩkuĩra o hau mbere ya Ngai." 
1Chronicles13:11 Nake Daudi akĩrakara tondũ mangʼũrĩ ma Jehova nĩmookĩrĩire Uza, nĩ ũndũ ũcio handũ hau hetagwo Perezu-Uza nginya ũmũthĩ." 
1Chronicles13:12 Daudi agĩĩtigĩra Ngai mũthenya ũcio, akĩũria atĩrĩ, “Ngaahota atĩa kũrehe ithandũkũ rĩĩrĩ rĩa Ngai kũrĩ niĩ?”" 
1Chronicles13:13 Tondũ ũcio Daudi ndaathiire na ithandũkũ rĩu Itũũra-inĩ Inene rĩa Daudi. Handũ ha ũguo, aarĩtwarire kwa Obedi-Edomu ũrĩa Mũgiiti." 
1Chronicles13:14 Ithandũkũ rĩu rĩa Ngai rĩaikarire na andũ a nyũmba ya Obedi-Edomu gwake mũciĩ mĩeri ĩtatũ, nake Jehova akĩrathima andũ a mũciĩ wake, o na kĩrĩa gĩothe aarĩ nakĩo." 
1Chronicles14:1 Na rĩrĩ, Hiramu mũthamaki wa Turo, nĩatũmĩire Daudi andũ, marĩ na mĩgogo ya mĩtarakwa, na aaki a mahiga na a mbaũ, nĩguo mamwakĩre nyũmba ya ũthamaki." 
1Chronicles14:2 Nake Daudi nĩamenyire atĩ Jehova nĩamũhaandĩte atuĩke mũthamaki wa Isiraeli, na atĩ ũthamaki wake nĩwatũũgĩrĩtio mũno nĩ ũndũ wa andũ ake a Isiraeli." 
1Chronicles14:3 Daudi nĩahikirie atumia angĩ arĩ kũu Jerusalemu, nake agĩtuĩka ithe wa aanake na airĩtu angĩ." 
1Chronicles14:4 Maya nĩmo marĩĩtwa ma ciana ciake iria ciaciarĩirwo kũu: Shamua, na Shobabu, na Nathani, na Solomoni," 
1Chronicles14:5 na Ibiharu, na Elishua, na Elipeleti," 
1Chronicles14:6 na Noga, na Nefegu, na Jafia," 
1Chronicles14:7 na Elishama, na Beeliada, na Elifeleti." 
1Chronicles14:8 Na rĩrĩa Afilisti maaiguire atĩ Daudi nĩaitĩrĩirio maguta agatuĩka mũthamaki wa Isiraeli guothe-rĩ, makĩambata, magĩthiĩ na mbũtũ ciao ciothe makamũcarie, nake Daudi aigua ũhoro ũcio akiumagara, agĩthiĩ akahũũrane nao." 
1Chronicles14:9 Na rĩrĩ, Afilisti nĩmookĩte magatharĩkĩra Gĩtuamba kĩa Refaimu;" 
1Chronicles14:10 nĩ ũndũ ũcio Daudi agĩtuĩria ũhoro kũrĩ Ngai, akĩmũũria atĩrĩ, “Thiĩ ngatharĩkĩre Afilisti? Nĩũkũmaneana moko-inĩ makwa?” Nake Jehova akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ, “Thiĩ, nĩngũmaneana moko-inĩ maku.”" 
1Chronicles14:11 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Daudi na andũ ake makĩambata, magĩthiĩ nginya Baali-Perazimu, na akĩmatooreria kuo. Nake akiuga atĩrĩ, “O ta ũrĩa maaĩ moinaga, noguo Ngai aharaganĩtie thũ ciakwa na guoko gwakwa.” Nĩ ũndũ ũcio handũ hau hagĩĩtwo Baali-Perazimu." 
1Chronicles14:12 Afilisti magĩtiganĩria ngai ciao kũu, nake Daudi agĩathana ngai icio icinwo na mwaki." 
1Chronicles14:13 Afilisti nĩmatharĩkĩire Gĩtuamba kĩu rĩngĩ; 
1Chronicles14:14 nĩ ũndũ ũcio Daudi agĩtuĩria ũhoro harĩ Ngai rĩngĩ, nake Ngai akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ, “Tiga kwambata, no mathiũrũrũkĩrie, na ũmatharĩkĩre ũmarutĩtie na mbere ya mĩtĩ ya mĩkũngũgũ." 
1Chronicles14:15 Rĩrĩa ũrĩigua mũkubio uumĩte igũrũ rĩa mĩtĩ ĩyo ya mĩkũngũgũ-rĩ, thiĩ ũkarũe, tondũ ũguo nĩkuonania atĩ Ngai arĩ mbere yaku akĩhũũra ita rĩa Afilisti.”" 
1Chronicles14:16 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Daudi agĩĩka o ta ũrĩa Ngai aamwathĩte, nao makĩhũũra mbũtũ cia Afilisti, o kuuma Gibeoni nginya Gezeri." 
1Chronicles14:17 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio ngumo ya Daudi ĩkĩhunja o bũrũri o bũrũri, nake Jehova agĩtũma ndũrĩrĩ ciothe imwĩtigĩre." 
1Chronicles15:1 Daudi aarĩkia gwaka nyũmba ciake mwene kũu Itũũra Inene rĩa Daudi, nĩahaarĩirie handũ ha kũiga ithandũkũ rĩa Ngai, na akĩrĩambĩra hema." 
1Chronicles15:2 Ningĩ Daudi akiuga atĩrĩ, “Gũtirĩ mũndũ ũngĩ wagĩrĩirwo nĩ gũkuua ithandũkũ rĩa Ngai tiga o Alawii, tondũ nĩo Jehova aathuurire makuuage ithandũkũ rĩu rĩa Jehova na mamũtungatagĩre nginya tene.”" 
1Chronicles15:3 Daudi nĩacookanĩrĩirie andũ othe a Isiraeli hamwe kũu Jerusalemu nĩguo marehe ithandũkũ rĩa Jehova handũ harĩa aarĩthondekeire. 
1Chronicles15:4 Nĩacookanĩrĩirie njiaro cia Harũni na Alawii ta ũũ: 
1Chronicles15:5 Kuuma kũrĩ njiaro cia Kohathu, Urieli nĩwe warĩ mũtongoria, na andũ a nyũmba yao 120;" 
1Chronicles15:6 kuuma kũrĩ njiaro cia Merari, Asaia nĩwe warĩ mũtongoria, na andũ a nyũmba yao 220;" 
1Chronicles15:7 kuuma kũrĩ njiaro cia Gerishoni, Joeli nĩwe warĩ mũtongoria, na andũ a nyũmba yao 130;" 
1Chronicles15:7 kuuma kũrĩ njiaro cia Gerishoni, Joeli nĩwe warĩ mũtongoria, na andũ a nyũmba yao 130;" 
1Chronicles15:8 kuuma kũrĩ njiaro cia Elizafani, Shemaia nĩwe warĩ mũtongoria, na andũ a nyũmba yao 200;" 
1Chronicles15:9 kuuma kũrĩ njiaro cia Hebironi, Elieli nĩwe warĩ mũtongoria, na andũ a nyũmba yao 80;" 
1Chronicles15:10 kuuma kũrĩ njiaro cia Uzieli, Aminadabu nĩwe warĩ mũtongoria, na andũ a nyũmba yao 112." 
1Chronicles15:11 Ningĩ Daudi agĩĩta Zadoku na Abiatharu arĩa athĩnjĩri-Ngai, na Urieli, na Asaia, na Joeli, na Shemaia, na Elieli, na Aminadabu arĩa Alawii." 
1Chronicles15:11 Ningĩ Daudi agĩĩta Zadoku na Abiatharu arĩa athĩnjĩri-Ngai, na Urieli, na Asaia, na Joeli, na Shemaia, na Elieli, na Aminadabu arĩa Alawii." 
1Chronicles15:12 Akĩmeera atĩrĩ, “Nĩ inyuĩ anene a nyũmba cia Alawii; inyuĩ ene na Alawii arĩa angĩ no nginya mwĩtherie na mwambatie ithandũkũ rĩa Jehova Ngai wa Isiraeli nginya handũ harĩa ndĩrĩthondekeire." 
1Chronicles15:13 Nĩ ũndũ inyuĩ, Alawii, mũtiarĩambatirie ihinda rĩa mbere, nĩkĩo Jehova Ngai witũ aatũũkĩrĩire na marakara. Tũtiigana gũtuĩria ũhoro wa ũrĩa tũngĩekire kũrĩ we, kũringana na ũrĩa gwatuĩtwo.”" 
1Chronicles15:14 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio, athĩnjĩri-Ngai na Alawii magĩĩtheria nĩgeetha maambatie ithandũkũ rĩa Jehova, Ngai wa Isiraeli." 
1Chronicles15:15 Nao Alawii magĩkuua ithandũkũ rĩa Ngai na mĩtĩ mĩraaya mamĩigĩrĩire ciande, o ta ũrĩa Musa aathanĩte kũringana na kiugo kĩa Jehova." 
1Chronicles15:16 Daudi akĩĩra atongoria a Alawii mathuure ariũ a ithe wao matuĩke aini, nao maine nyĩmbo cia gĩkeno makĩhũũraga inanda cia kĩnũbi, na cia mũgeeto, na thaani iria ihũũrithanagio ikagamba." 
1Chronicles15:17 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Alawii magĩthuura Hemani mũrũ wa Joeli; kuuma harĩ ariũ a ithe, na magĩthuura Asafu mũrũ wa Berekia; na kuuma harĩ ariũ a ithe Amerari magĩthuura Ethani mũrũ wa Kushaia;" 
1Chronicles15:17 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Alawii magĩthuura Hemani mũrũ wa Joeli; kuuma harĩ ariũ a ithe, na magĩthuura Asafu mũrũ wa Berekia; na kuuma harĩ ariũ a ithe Amerari magĩthuura Ethani mũrũ wa Kushaia;" 
1Chronicles15:18 na ningĩ hamwe nao magĩthuura ariũ a ithe matuĩke anini ao wathani-inĩ. nao nĩ: Zekaria, na Jaazieli, na Shemiramothu, na Jehieli, na Uni, na Eliabu, na Benaia, na Maaseia, na Matithia, na Elifelehu, na Mikineia, na Obedi-Edomu, na Jeieli, arĩa arangĩri ihingo." 
1Chronicles15:19 Hemani, na Asafu na Ethani maarĩ aini na maahũũrithanagia thaani cia gĩcango;" 
1Chronicles15:20 Zekaria, na Azieli, na Shemiramothu, na Jehieli, na Uni, na Eliabu, na Maaseia, na Benaia maarĩ a kũhũũra inanda cia kĩnũbi, kũringana na Alamothu." 
1Chronicles15:21 Nake Matithia, na Elifelehu, na Mikineia, na Obedi-Edomu, na Jeieli, na Azazia maarĩ a kũhũũra inanda cia mũgeeto, matongoretie kũringana na Sheminithu (ũguo nĩ ta kuuga mũgambo ũkũruruma)." 
1Chronicles15:22 Kenania ũrĩa mũtongoria wa Alawii nĩwe warũgamĩrĩire ũini; ũcio nĩguo warĩ wĩra wake tondũ aarĩ na ũũgĩ wa guo. 
1Chronicles15:23 Berekia na Elikana nĩo maarĩ a kũrangĩra mĩrango nĩ ũndũ wa ithandũkũ rĩu. 
1Chronicles15:24 Athĩnjĩri-Ngai, nĩo Shebania, na Joshafatu, na Nethaneli, na Amasai, na Zekaria, na Benaia, na Eliezeri maarĩ a kũhuha tũrumbeta mbere ya ithandũkũ rĩa Ngai. Obedi-Edomu na Jehia o nao maarĩ arangĩri a mĩrango nĩ ũndũ wa ithandũkũ rĩu." 
1Chronicles15:25 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Daudi na athuuri a Isiraeli, na anene a ikundi cia ngiri, magĩthiĩ kwambatia ithandũkũ rĩa kĩrĩkanĩro kĩa Jehova kuuma nyũmba ya Obedi-Edomu makenete." 
1Chronicles15:26 Tondũ Ngai nĩateithĩtie Alawii arĩa maakuuaga ithandũkũ rĩa kĩrĩkanĩro kĩa Jehova-rĩ, ndegwa mũgwanja na ndũrũme mũgwanja nĩciarutirwo igongona." 
1Chronicles15:27 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Daudi eehumbĩte nguo ya igũrũ ndaaya ya gatani ĩrĩa njega, na noguo Alawii othe arĩa makuuĩte ithandũkũ rĩu mehumbĩte, o na aini na Kenania ũrĩa warĩ mũtongoria wa ũini. O na ningĩ Daudi nĩehumbĩte ebodi ya gatani." 
1Chronicles15:28 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio andũ othe a Isiraeli makĩambatia ithandũkũ rĩa kĩrĩkanĩro kĩa Jehova makĩanagĩrĩra, makĩhuhaga macoro na tũrumbeta, na makĩhũũrithanagia thaani iria ihũũrithanagio na ikagamba, na makĩhũũraga inanda cia kĩnũbi na cia mũgeeto." 
1Chronicles15:29 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa ithandũkũ rĩa kĩrĩkanĩro kĩa Jehova rĩatoonyaga Itũũra Inene rĩa Daudi-rĩ, Mikali mwarĩ wa Saũlũ nĩacũthĩrĩirie arĩ ndirica-inĩ. Na rĩrĩa onire Mũthamaki Daudi akĩina akĩrũgarũgaga, akĩmũnyarara ngoro-inĩ yake." 
1Chronicles16:1 Alawii makĩrehe ithandũkũ rĩa Ngai, makĩrĩtoonyia thĩinĩ wa hema ĩrĩa yaambĩtwo nĩ Daudi nĩ ũndũ warĩo, na makĩrutĩra Ngai maruta ma njino na maruta ma ũiguano." 
1Chronicles16:2 Daudi aarĩkia kũruta maruta ma njino na maruta ma ũiguano-rĩ, akĩrathima andũ acio thĩinĩ wa rĩĩtwa rĩa Jehova." 
1Chronicles16:3 Ningĩ akĩhe andũ a Isiraeli othe, arũme na andũ-a-nja o mũndũ mũgate, na gĩcunjĩ kĩa nyama, na ngũmba ya thabibũ nyũmũ." 
1Chronicles16:4 Nĩathuurire Alawii amwe matungatage mbere ya ithandũkũ rĩa Jehova, na mathaithanagĩre andũ, na macookagie ngaatho, na magoocage Jehova, Ngai wa Isiraeli, nao nĩo:" 
1Chronicles16:5 Asafu ũrĩa warĩ mũnene wao, na mũnini wake aarĩ Zekaria, agacookwo nĩ Jeieli, na Shemiramothu, na Jehieli, na Matithia, na Eliabu, na Benaia, na Obedi-Edomu, na Jeieli. Acio maarĩ a kũhũũraga inanda cia kĩnũbi na inanda cia mũgeeto, nake Asafu agambagie thaani iria ihũũrithanagio ikagamba," 
1Chronicles16:6 nao athĩnjĩri-Ngai, Benaia na Jahazieli, maarĩ a kũhuha tũrumbeta hĩndĩ ciothe marĩ mbere ya ithandũkũ rĩa kĩrĩkanĩro kĩa Ngai." 
1Chronicles16:7 Mũthenya ũcio ũndũ wa mbere, ũrĩa Daudi eekire nĩ kũnengera Asafu na athiritũ ake thaburi ĩno ya gũcookeria Jehova ngaatho:" 
1Chronicles16:8 Cookeriai Jehova ngaatho, kaĩrai rĩĩtwa rĩake; menyithaniai ndũrĩrĩ-inĩ ũrĩa ekĩte." 
1Chronicles16:9 Mũinĩrei, mũmũinĩre mũkĩmũgoocaga, mũheane ũhoro wa ciĩko ciake ciothe cia magegania." 
1Chronicles16:10 Mwĩrahei nĩ ũndũ wa rĩĩtwa rĩake itheru; ngoro cia arĩa marongoragia Jehova nĩ ikene. 
1Chronicles16:11 Mathaai Jehova o na hinya wake; mũmaathage ũthiũ wake hĩndĩ ciothe. 
1Chronicles16:12 Ririkanai magegania marĩa ekĩte, na ciama ciake, na matuĩro ma ciira marĩa atuĩte," 
1Chronicles16:13 inyuĩ njiaro cia Isiraeli ndungata yake, o inyuĩ ciana cia Jakubu, inyuĩ andũ ake arĩa athuurĩte." 
1Chronicles16:14 Jehova nĩwe Ngai witũ; matuĩro make ma ciira marĩ thĩ yothe. 
1Chronicles16:15 Nĩaririkanaga kĩrĩkanĩro gĩake nginya tene, nĩkĩo kiugo kĩrĩa aathanire, kĩrũmagĩrĩrwo nĩ njiarwa ngiri," 
1Chronicles16:16 kĩrĩkanĩro kĩrĩa aarĩkanĩire na Iburahĩmu, na noguo mwĩhĩtwa ũrĩa eehĩtire harĩ Isaaka." 
1Chronicles16:17 Nĩagĩĩkĩrire hinya harĩ Jakubu kĩrĩ kĩrĩra gĩake kĩa watho wa kũrũmagĩrĩrwo, agĩgĩĩkĩra hinya kũrĩ Isiraeli kĩrĩ kĩrĩkanĩro gĩa gũtũũra tene na tene, akiuga atĩrĩ:" 
1Chronicles16:18 “Wee nĩwe ngaahe bũrũri wa Kaanani, ũtuĩke igai rĩrĩa ũkaagaya.”" 
1Chronicles16:19 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa maarĩ o anini magĩtarwo, o anini biũ, na maarĩ ageni kuo-rĩ," 
1Chronicles16:20 moorũũraga kuuma rũrĩrĩ rũmwe nginya rũrĩa rũngĩ, na kuuma ũthamaki-inĩ ũmwe nginya ũrĩa ũngĩ." 
1Chronicles16:21 Ndarĩ mũndũ o na ũmwe etĩkĩririe amanyariire; nĩarũithirie athamaki nĩ ũndũ wao, akĩmeera atĩrĩ:" 
1Chronicles16:22 “Mũtikanahutie andũ arĩa akwa aitĩrĩrie maguta; mũtikaneke anabii akwa ũũru.” 
1Chronicles16:23 Inĩrai Jehova, inyuĩ andũ a thĩ yothe; mũhunjagie ũhonokio wake mũthenya o mũthenya." 
1Chronicles16:24 Umbũrai riiri wake kũrĩ ndũrĩrĩ, mumbũre mawĩko make ma magegania kũrĩ andũ othe." 
1Chronicles16:25 Nĩgũkorwo Jehova nĩ mũnene, na nĩ wa kũgoocwo mũno; nĩwe wa gwĩtigĩrwo gũkĩra ngai ciothe." 
1Chronicles16:26 Nĩgũkorwo ngai ciothe cia ndũrĩrĩ nĩ mĩhianano, no Jehova nĩwe wombire igũrũ." 
1Chronicles16:27 Riiri na ũnene irĩ mbere yake; hinya na gĩkeno itũũraga gwake. 
1Chronicles16:28 Tũũgĩriai Jehova, inyuĩ mĩhĩrĩga ya ndũrĩrĩ, mũtũũgĩrie Jehova nĩ ũndũ wa riiri na hinya wake," 
1Chronicles16:29 Tũũgĩriai Jehova, nĩ ũndũ wa riiri ũrĩa wagĩrĩire rĩĩtwa rĩake. Mũreherei maruta na mũũke mbere yake; mũhooe Jehova thĩinĩ wa riiri wa ũtheru wake." 
1Chronicles16:30 Inainai mũrĩ mbere yake, inyuĩ andũ a thĩ yothe! Thĩ ĩhaandĩtwo ĩkarũma; ndĩngĩenyenyeka." 
1Chronicles16:31 Igũrũ nĩ rĩkene, thĩ nĩĩcanjamũke; nakuo ndũrĩrĩ-inĩ nĩ kuugwo atĩrĩ, “Jehova nĩwe ũthamakaga!”" 
1Chronicles16:32 Iria nĩ rĩrurume, na indo iria ciothe irĩ thĩinĩ warĩo; mĩgũnda nĩĩkenerũrũke na indo iria ciothe irĩ thĩinĩ wayo!" 
1Chronicles16:33 Hĩndĩ ĩyo mĩtĩ ya mĩtitũ nĩĩkaina; ĩine nĩ gũkena ĩrĩ mbere ya Jehova, nĩgũkorwo nĩarooka gũciirithia thĩ." 
1Chronicles16:34 Cookeriai Jehova ngaatho, nĩgũkorwo nĩ mwega; wendo wake ũtũũraga nginya tene." 
1Chronicles16:35 Anĩrĩrai muuge atĩrĩ, “Tũhonokie, Wee Ngai Mũhonokia witũ; tũcookanĩrĩrie na ũtũkũũre kuuma kũrĩ ndũrĩrĩ, nĩguo tũcookagĩrie rĩĩtwa rĩaku itheru ngaatho, nĩgeetha twĩrahage nĩ ũndũ wa ũgooci waku.”" 
1Chronicles16:36 Jehova arogoocwo, o we Ngai wa Isiraeli, kuuma tene na tene, nginya tene na tene. Nao andũ othe makiuga atĩrĩ, “Ameni” na “Goocai Jehova.”" 
1Chronicles16:37 Daudi agĩtiga Asafu na athiritũ ake hau mbere ya ithandũkũ rĩa kĩrĩkanĩro kĩa Jehova nĩguo matungatage kuo hĩndĩ ciothe, kũringana na mabata ma o mũthenya." 
1Chronicles16:38 O na ningĩ agĩtiga Obedi-Edomu na athiritũ ake mĩrongo ĩtandatũ na anana matungatage hamwe nao. Obedi-Edomu mũrũ wa Jeduthuni marĩ na Hosa maarĩ arangĩri a kĩhingo. 
1Chronicles16:39 Daudi agĩtiga Zadoku ũrĩa mũthĩnjĩri-Ngai hamwe na athĩnjĩri-Ngai arĩa angĩ hau mbere ya hema ĩrĩa nyamũre, kũndũ kũrĩa gũtũũgĩru kũu Gibeoni," 
1Chronicles16:40 nĩguo marutagĩre Jehova maruta ma njino kĩgongona-inĩ kĩa maruta ma njino hĩndĩ ciothe, rũciinĩ na hwaĩ-inĩ, kũringana na ũrĩa kwandĩkĩtwo watho-inĩ wa Jehova ũrĩa aaheete andũ a Isiraeli." 
1Chronicles16:41 Arĩa maarĩ hamwe nao nĩ Hemani na Jeduthuni, na arĩa angĩ maarĩ athuure na makagwetwo na marĩĩtwa nĩgeetha macookagĩrie Jehova ngaatho, makiugaga atĩrĩ, “Tondũ wendo wake ũtũũraga nginya tene.”" 
1Chronicles16:42 Hemani na Jeduthuni nĩo meehokeirwo kũhuha tũrumbeta, na kũhũũrithania thaani iria ihũũrithanagio ikagamba, o na kũhũũraga inanda iria ingĩ cia kũina rwĩmbo rwamũre. Ariũ a Jeduthuni nĩo maaheirwo wĩra wa kũrangĩra kĩhingo." 
1Chronicles16:43 Hĩndĩ ĩyo andũ othe magĩthiĩ o mũndũ gwake mũciĩ, nake Daudi agĩcooka mũciĩ akarathime andũ a nyũmba yake." 
1Chronicles17:1 Thuutha wa Daudi gũikara nyũmba yake ya ũthamaki kwa ihinda, akĩĩra mũnabii Nathani atĩrĩ, “Niĩ njikaraga nyũmba ya ũthamaki yakĩtwo na mĩtarakwa, o rĩrĩa ithandũkũ rĩa kĩrĩkanĩro kĩa Jehova rĩigĩtwo hema-inĩ.”"
